}\n }\n Logger.log(\"TERMINÉ - \" + compteur + \" vins mis à jour\");\n } catch (e) { Logger.log(\"Erreur updatePastilleEtPhotoExistants: \" + e.message); }\n}\n\nfunction testVerifDispo() {\n const result \u003d verifierDisponibiliteSAQ(\"14199495\", \"23037\");\n Logger.log(JSON.stringify(result));\n}\n\nfunction TESTER_DISPO() {\n const result \u003d verifierDispoSAQ('12135092', '23053');\n Logger.log('Résultat: ' + JSON.stringify(result));\n return result;\n}\n\n*/\n\n\n\n\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n// GRAPHQL SAQ - TEST FINAL 19 FÉV 2026\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\nfunction chercherProduitSAQ_GRAPHQL_V1(codeBarres) {\n const url \u003d 'https://catalog-service.adobe.io/graphql';\n \n const query \u003d {\n query: `\n query productSearch($phrase: String!, $pageSize: Int, $currentPage: Int) {\n productSearch(phrase: $phrase, page_size: $pageSize, current_page: $currentPage) {\n items {\n product {\n sku\n name\n }\n }\n }\n }\n `,\n variables: {\n phrase: codeBarres.toString().padStart(14, '0'),\n pageSize: 1,\n currentPage: 1\n }\n };\n \n const options \u003d {\n method: 'post',\n contentType: 'application/json',\n headers: {\n 'x-api-key': '7a7d7422bd784f2481a047e03a73feaf',\n 'magento-environment-id': '2ce24571-9db9-4786-84a9-5f129257ccbb',\n 'magento-store-view-code': 'fr',\n 'magento-website-code': 'base',\n 'magento-store-code': 'main_website_store'\n },\n payload: JSON.stringify(query),\n muteHttpExceptions: true\n };\n \n try {\n const response \u003d UrlFetchApp.fetch(url, options);\n const texte \u003d response.getContentText();\n \n Logger.log('Status: ' + response.getResponseCode());\n Logger.log('Réponse (500 chars): ' + texte.substring(0, 500));\n \n const data \u003d JSON.parse(texte);\n \n if (data.data?.productSearch?.items?.length \u003e 0) {\n const sku \u003d data.data.productSearch.items[0].product.sku;\n return sku;\n }\n \n return null;\n } catch(e) {\n Logger.log('Erreur: ' + e.toString());\n return null;\n }\n}\n\n\nfunction TEST_GRAPHQL_FINAL() {\n Logger.log('\u003d\u003d\u003d TEST GRAPHQL SAQ - 19 FÉV 2026 \u003d\u003d\u003d');\n const result \u003d chercherProduitSAQ_GRAPHQL_V1('08423110755530');\n Logger.log('Code-barres: 08423110755530');\n Logger.log('SKU retourné: ' + result);\n Logger.log('\u003d\u003d\u003d FIN TEST \u003d\u003d\u003d');\n return result;\n}\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n// FIN GRAPHQL SAQ - TEST FINAL 19 FÉV 2026\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n// VÉRIFICATION DISPO - GRAPHQL - 19 FÉV 2026\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n\nfunction TEST_DISPO_GRAPHQL() {\n Logger.log('\u003d\u003d\u003d TEST DISPO GRAPHQL - 19 FÉV 2026 \u003d\u003d\u003d');\n \n // Test 1: Produit qu'on sait dispo\n const test1 \u003d verifierDispoSAQ_GRAPHQL_V1('12135092', '23359');\n Logger.log('Test 1 - 12135092 @ 23359: ' + (test1 ? '✅ DISPO' : '❌ PAS DISPO'));\n \n // Test 2: Produit pas dispo\n const test2 \u003d verifierDispoSAQ_GRAPHQL_V1('12135092', '23053');\n Logger.log('Test 2 - 12135092 @ 23053: ' + (test2 ? '✅ DISPO' : '❌ PAS DISPO'));\n \n Logger.log('\u003d\u003d\u003d FIN TEST \u003d\u003d\u003d');\n}\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n// FIN VÉRIFICATION DISPO - 19 FÉV 2026\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n\n\n\nfunction TEST_DISPO_UNE_SUCCURSALE() {\n const codeSAQ \u003d '12135092'; // un vin que tu sais disponible\n const succursale \u003d '23359'; // ta succursale\n const result \u003d verifierDispoSAQ_GRAPHQL_V1(codeSAQ, succursale);\n Logger.log('Résultat: ' + (result ? '✅ DISPO' : '❌ PAS DISPO'));\n}\n\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n// LISTE SUCCURSALES DISPONIBLES - 20 FÉV 2026\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\nfunction getSuccursalesDisponibles(codeSAQ, latitude, longitude) {\n try {\n const urlProduit \u003d `https://www.saq.com/fr/${codeSAQ}`;\n const response \u003d UrlFetchApp.fetch(urlProduit, {\n 'headers': {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'},\n 'muteHttpExceptions': true\n });\n \n const html \u003d response.getContentText();\n const match \u003d html.match(/\"productId\":\"(\\d+)\"/);\n \n if (!match) {\n Logger.log('Produit non trouvé');\n return [];\n }\n \n const idInterne \u003d match[1];\n const succursales \u003d [];\n let loaded \u003d 0;\n let continuer \u003d true;\n \n // Utiliser les coordonnées fournies ou Lanoraie par défaut\n const lat \u003d latitude || 45.9697;\n const lng \u003d longitude || -73.2219;\n \n while (continuer) {\n const urlAPI \u003d `https://www.saq.com/fr/store/locator/ajaxlist/context/product/id/${idInterne}?loaded\u003d${loaded}\u0026fastly_geolocate\u003d1\u0026latitude\u003d${lat}\u0026longitude\u003d${lng}\u0026_\u003d${Date.now()}`;\n \n const responseAPI \u003d UrlFetchApp.fetch(urlAPI, {\n 'headers': {\n 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0',\n 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',\n 'Referer': urlProduit\n },\n 'muteHttpExceptions': true\n });\n \n const data \u003d JSON.parse(responseAPI.getContentText());\n \n data.list.forEach(function(store) {\n succursales.push({\n numero: store.identifier,\n nom: store.name,\n distance: store.distance,\n adresse: store.address1,\n ville: store.city,\n quantite: store.qty || 0\n });\n });\n \n if (data.is_last_page) {\n continuer \u003d false;\n }\n \n loaded +\u003d 10;\n Utilities.sleep(300);\n }\n \n Logger.log(`Total: ${succursales.length} succursales`);\n return succursales;\n \n } catch(e) {\n Logger.log('Erreur: ' + e.toString());\n return [];\n }\n}\n\nfunction TEST_AVEC_COORDONNEES() {\n Logger.log('\u003d\u003d\u003d TEST AVEC COORDONNÉES BERTHIERVILLE \u003d\u003d\u003d');\n // Coordonnées de Berthierville\n const result \u003d getSuccursalesDisponibles('12135092', 46.0808, -73.1827);\n \n for (let i \u003d 0; i \u003c Math.min(5, result.length); i++) {\n const s \u003d result[i];\n Logger.log(`${s.nom} - ${s.distance} - ${s.quantite} btl - ${s.ville}`);\n }\n \n Logger.log(`Total: ${result.length} succursales`);\n Logger.log('\u003d\u003d\u003d FIN TEST \u003d\u003d\u003d');\n}\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n// FIN LISTE SUCCURSALES - 20 FÉV 2026\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\nfunction verifierDispoSAQ_GRAPHQL_V1(codeSAQ, codeSuccursale) {\n const url \u003d 'https://catalog-service.adobe.io/graphql';\n \n const query \u003d {\n query: `\n query productSearch($phrase: String!, $filter: [SearchClauseInput!]) {\n productSearch(phrase: $phrase, page_size: 1, filter: $filter) {\n total_count\n items {\n product {\n sku\n name\n }\n }\n }\n }\n `,\n variables: {\n phrase: codeSAQ.toString(),\n filter: [\n { attribute: \"store_availability_list\", eq: codeSuccursale.toString() }\n ]\n }\n };\n \n const options \u003d {\n method: 'post',\n contentType: 'application/json',\n headers: {\n 'x-api-key': '7a7d7422bd784f2481a047e03a73feaf',\n 'magento-environment-id': '2ce24571-9db9-4786-84a9-5f129257ccbb',\n 'magento-store-view-code': 'fr',\n 'magento-website-code': 'base',\n 'magento-store-code': 'main_website_store'\n },\n payload: JSON.stringify(query),\n muteHttpExceptions: true\n };\n \n try {\n const response \u003d UrlFetchApp.fetch(url, options);\n const data \u003d JSON.parse(response.getContentText());\n \n if (data.data?.productSearch?.total_count \u003e 0) {\n // Produit disponible, maintenant récupérer la quantité via l'autre API\n const urlProduit \u003d `https://www.saq.com/fr/${codeSAQ}`;\n const responseProduit \u003d UrlFetchApp.fetch(urlProduit, {\n 'headers': {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'},\n 'muteHttpExceptions': true\n });\n \n const html \u003d responseProduit.getContentText();\n const match \u003d html.match(/\"productId\":\"(\\d+)\"/);\n \n if (!match) {\n return { disponible: true, quantite: null };\n }\n \n const idInterne \u003d match[1];\n \n // Chercher dans les succursales\n const urlAPI \u003d `https://www.saq.com/fr/store/locator/ajaxlist/context/product/id/${idInterne}?loaded\u003d0\u0026fastly_geolocate\u003d1\u0026latitude\u003d46.0808\u0026longitude\u003d-73.1827\u0026_\u003d${Date.now()}`;\n \n const responseAPI \u003d UrlFetchApp.fetch(urlAPI, {\n 'headers': {\n 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0',\n 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',\n 'Referer': urlProduit\n },\n 'muteHttpExceptions': true\n });\n \n const apiData \u003d JSON.parse(responseAPI.getContentText());\n \n // Trouver la succursale\n for (let i \u003d 0; i \u003c apiData.list.length; i++) {\n if (apiData.list[i].identifier \u003d\u003d\u003d codeSuccursale.toString()) {\n return { \n disponible: true, \n quantite: apiData.list[i].qty || 0 \n };\n }\n }\n \n // Si on arrive ici, GraphQL dit dispo mais on trouve pas la quantité\n return { disponible: true, quantite: null };\n }\n \n return { disponible: false, quantite: 0 };\n \n } catch(e) {\n Logger.log('Erreur: ' + e.toString());\n return { disponible: false, quantite: 0 };\n }\n}\n\nfunction TEST_DISPO_AVEC_QTY() {\n Logger.log('\u003d\u003d\u003d TEST DISPO AVEC QUANTITÉ \u003d\u003d\u003d');\n \n const test1 \u003d verifierDispoSAQ_GRAPHQL_V1('12135092', '23196');\n Logger.log('Test 1 - 12135092 @ Sorel (23196): ' + JSON.stringify(test1));\n \n const test2 \u003d verifierDispoSAQ_GRAPHQL_V1('12135092', '23053');\n Logger.log('Test 2 - 12135092 @ Berthierville (23053): ' + JSON.stringify(test2));\n \n Logger.log('\u003d\u003d\u003d FIN TEST \u003d\u003d\u003d');\n}\n\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n// PROMOTIONS SAQ - 21 FÉV 2026\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n// TOUTES LES PROMOTIONS SAQ - 21 FÉV 2026\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\nfunction getToutesPromotionsSAQ(mesCodesSAQ) {\n const url \u003d 'https://catalog-service.adobe.io/graphql';\n \n const query \u003d {\n query: `\n query productSearch($phrase: String!, $pageSize: Int, $filter: [SearchClauseInput!]) {\n productSearch(phrase: $phrase, page_size: $pageSize, filter: $filter) {\n total_count\n items {\n product {\n sku\n name\n price_range {\n minimum_price {\n regular_price {\n value\n currency\n }\n final_price {\n value\n currency\n }\n discount {\n percent_off\n amount_off\n }\n }\n }\n }\n productView {\n attributes {\n name\n value\n }\n }\n }\n }\n }\n `,\n variables: {\n phrase: \"\",\n pageSize: 200,\n filter: [\n { attribute: \"categoryPath\", eq: \"promotions/vin\" },\n { attribute: \"availability_front\", in: [\"En succursale\"] },\n { attribute: \"visibility\", in: [\"Catalog\", \"Catalog, Search\"] }\n ]\n }\n };\n \n const options \u003d {\n method: 'post',\n contentType: 'application/json',\n headers: {\n 'x-api-key': '7a7d7422bd784f2481a047e03a73feaf',\n 'magento-environment-id': '2ce24571-9db9-4786-84a9-5f129257ccbb',\n 'magento-store-view-code': 'fr',\n 'magento-website-code': 'base',\n 'magento-store-code': 'main_website_store'\n },\n payload: JSON.stringify(query),\n muteHttpExceptions: true\n };\n \n try {\n const response \u003d UrlFetchApp.fetch(url, options);\n const data \u003d JSON.parse(response.getContentText());\n \n if (!data.data?.productSearch?.items) {\n return [];\n }\n \n const tousLesPromos \u003d data.data.productSearch.items;\n const autresPromos \u003d [];\n \n // Créer Set de MES codes pour exclusion\n const mesCodes \u003d new Set((mesCodesSAQ || []).map(function(code) {\n return code.toString().trim().replace(/^'/, '');\n }));\n \n tousLesPromos.forEach(function(item) {\n const sku \u003d item.product.sku.toString();\n \n // Si ce n'est PAS un de mes vins\n if (!mesCodes.has(sku)) {\n const priceData \u003d item.product.price_range.minimum_price;\n const prixReg \u003d priceData.regular_price.value;\n const prixFinal \u003d priceData.final_price.value;\n const rabais \u003d prixReg - prixFinal;\n \n // Extraire couleur et pays des attributs\n let couleur \u003d '';\n let pays \u003d '';\n let cepage \u003d '';\n if (item.productView?.attributes) {\n item.productView.attributes.forEach(function(attr) {\n if (attr.name \u003d\u003d\u003d 'couleur') couleur \u003d attr.value;\n if (attr.name \u003d\u003d\u003d 'pays') pays \u003d attr.value;\n if (attr.name \u003d\u003d\u003d 'cepage') cepage \u003d attr.value;\n });\n }\n \n if (prixFinal \u003c\u003d 30) {\n let pointsBonis \u003d 0;\n try {\n const promoUrl \u003d `https://www.saq.com/fr/inspire/product/promotions/sku/${sku}/`;\n const promoResponse \u003d UrlFetchApp.fetch(promoUrl, {\n 'headers': {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'},\n 'muteHttpExceptions': true\n });\n if (promoResponse.getResponseCode() \u003d\u003d\u003d 200) {\n let promoData \u003d JSON.parse(promoResponse.getContentText());\n if (typeof promoData \u003d\u003d\u003d 'string') promoData \u003d JSON.parse(promoData);\n if (Array.isArray(promoData)) {\n promoData.forEach(function(promo) {\n if (promo.type \u003d\u003d\u003d 'BONUS_POINTS') pointsBonis \u003d promo.value || 0;\n });\n }\n }\n } catch(e) {}\n autresPromos.push({\n codeSAQ: sku,\n nom: item.product.name,\n prixRegulier: prixReg,\n prixFinal: prixFinal,\n rabais: rabais,\n couleur: couleur,\n pays: pays,\n cepage: cepage,\n pointsBonis: pointsBonis\n });\n Utilities.sleep(200);\n }\n }\n });\n\n\n\n Logger.log(`Trouvé ${autresPromos.length} autres vins en promotion`);\n return autresPromos;\n \n } catch(e) {\n Logger.log('Erreur: ' + e.toString());\n return [];\n }\n}\n\nfunction TEST_TOUTES_PROMOS() {\n Logger.log('\u003d\u003d\u003d TEST TOUTES LES PROMOS \u003d\u003d\u003d');\n \n // Mes codes (à exclure)\n const mesCodes \u003d ['14954139', '10270881'];\n \n const promos \u003d getToutesPromotionsSAQ(mesCodes);\n \n Logger.log(`Total autres vins en promo: ${promos.length}`);\n Logger.log('---');\n Logger.log('Premiers 5:');\n \n for (let i \u003d 0; i \u003c Math.min(5, promos.length); i++) {\n const p \u003d promos[i];\n Logger.log(`${p.nom} (${p.codeSAQ})`);\n Logger.log(` ${p.prixRegulier}$ → ${p.prixFinal}$ (rabais ${p.rabais}$)`);\n Logger.log(` ${p.couleur} - ${p.pays}`);\n Logger.log('---');\n }\n \n Logger.log('\u003d\u003d\u003d FIN TEST \u003d\u003d\u003d');\n}\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n// FIN TOUTES LES PROMOTIONS - 21 FÉV 2026\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n\nfunction getPromotionsSAQ(listeCodesSAQ) {\n const url \u003d 'https://catalog-service.adobe.io/graphql';\n \n const query \u003d {\n query: `\n query productSearch($phrase: String!, $pageSize: Int, $filter: [SearchClauseInput!]) {\n productSearch(phrase: $phrase, page_size: $pageSize, filter: $filter) {\n total_count\n items {\n product {\n sku\n name\n price_range {\n minimum_price {\n regular_price {\n value\n currency\n }\n final_price {\n value\n currency\n }\n discount {\n percent_off\n amount_off\n }\n }\n }\n }\n }\n }\n }\n `,\n variables: {\n phrase: \"\",\n pageSize: 100,\n filter: [\n { attribute: \"categoryPath\", eq: \"promotions/vin\" },\n { attribute: \"availability_front\", in: [\"En succursale\", \"En ligne\"] },\n { attribute: \"visibility\", in: [\"Catalog\", \"Catalog, Search\"] }\n ]\n }\n };\n \n const options \u003d {\n method: 'post',\n contentType: 'application/json',\n headers: {\n 'x-api-key': '7a7d7422bd784f2481a047e03a73feaf',\n 'magento-environment-id': '2ce24571-9db9-4786-84a9-5f129257ccbb',\n 'magento-store-view-code': 'fr',\n 'magento-website-code': 'base',\n 'magento-store-code': 'main_website_store'\n },\n payload: JSON.stringify(query),\n muteHttpExceptions: true\n };\n \n try {\n const response \u003d UrlFetchApp.fetch(url, options);\n const data \u003d JSON.parse(response.getContentText());\n \n if (!data.data?.productSearch?.items) {\n return [];\n }\n \n const tousLesPromos \u003d data.data.productSearch.items;\n const mesPromos \u003d [];\n \n const mesCodes \u003d new Set(listeCodesSAQ.map(function(code) {\n return code.toString().trim().replace(/^'/, '');\n }));\n \n tousLesPromos.forEach(function(item) {\n const sku \u003d item.product.sku.toString();\n \n if (mesCodes.has(sku)) {\n const priceData \u003d item.product.price_range.minimum_price;\n const prixReg \u003d priceData.regular_price.value;\n const prixFinal \u003d priceData.final_price.value;\n const rabais \u003d prixReg - prixFinal;\n \n let pointsBonis \u003d 0;\n try {\n const promoUrl \u003d `https://www.saq.com/fr/inspire/product/promotions/sku/${sku}/`;\n const promoResponse \u003d UrlFetchApp.fetch(promoUrl, { \n 'headers': {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'},\n 'muteHttpExceptions': true \n });\n \n if (promoResponse.getResponseCode() \u003d\u003d\u003d 200) {\n const promoText \u003d promoResponse.getContentText();\n let promoData \u003d JSON.parse(promoText);\n \n // Si c'est encore un string, parser une 2e fois\n if (typeof promoData \u003d\u003d\u003d 'string') {\n promoData \u003d JSON.parse(promoData);\n }\n \n if (Array.isArray(promoData)) {\n promoData.forEach(function(promo) {\n if (promo.type \u003d\u003d\u003d 'BONUS_POINTS') {\n pointsBonis \u003d promo.value || 0;\n }\n });\n }\n }\n } catch(e) {\n // Ignorer erreurs points bonis\n }\n \n mesPromos.push({\n codeSAQ: sku,\n nom: item.product.name,\n prixRegulier: prixReg,\n prixFinal: prixFinal,\n rabais: rabais,\n pointsBonis: pointsBonis\n });\n \n Utilities.sleep(200);\n }\n });\n \n Logger.log(`Trouvé ${mesPromos.length} de vos vins en promotion`);\n return mesPromos;\n \n } catch(e) {\n Logger.log('Erreur: ' + e.toString());\n return [];\n }\n}\n\nfunction TEST_PROMOTIONS_SIMPLE() {\n Logger.log('\u003d\u003d\u003d TEST PROMO SIMPLE \u003d\u003d\u003d');\n \n const mesCodes \u003d ['14954139'];\n const promos \u003d getPromotionsSAQ(mesCodes);\n \n if (promos.length \u003e 0) {\n const p \u003d promos[0];\n Logger.log(`${p.nom} (${p.codeSAQ})`);\n Logger.log(`Prix: ${p.prixRegulier}$ → ${p.prixFinal}$ (rabais ${p.rabais}$)`);\n Logger.log(`Points bonis: ${p.pointsBonis}`);\n } else {\n Logger.log('Aucune promo trouvée');\n }\n \n Logger.log('\u003d\u003d\u003d FIN TEST \u003d\u003d\u003d');\n}\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n// FIN PROMOTIONS SAQ - 21 FÉV 2026\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n// VÉRIFICATION PRIX SAQ - 21 FÉV 2026\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\nfunction verifierEtMettreAJourPrixSAQ(codebarre, codeSAQ) {\n try {\n // 1. Récupérer prix actuel SAQ\n const url \u003d 'https://catalog-service.adobe.io/graphql';\n \n const query \u003d {\n query: `\n query productSearch($phrase: String!) {\n productSearch(phrase: $phrase, page_size: 1) {\n items {\n product {\n sku\n price_range {\n minimum_price {\n regular_price {\n value\n }\n }\n }\n }\n }\n }\n }\n `,\n variables: {\n phrase: codeSAQ.toString()\n }\n };\n \n const options \u003d {\n method: 'post',\n contentType: 'application/json',\n headers: {\n 'x-api-key': '7a7d7422bd784f2481a047e03a73feaf',\n 'magento-environment-id': '2ce24571-9db9-4786-84a9-5f129257ccbb',\n 'magento-store-view-code': 'fr',\n 'magento-website-code': 'base',\n 'magento-store-code': 'main_website_store'\n },\n payload: JSON.stringify(query),\n muteHttpExceptions: true\n };\n \n const response \u003d UrlFetchApp.fetch(url, options);\n const data \u003d JSON.parse(response.getContentText());\n \n if (!data.data?.productSearch?.items?.[0]) {\n return { updated: false, message: 'Produit non trouvé sur SAQ' };\n }\n \n const prixSAQ \u003d data.data.productSearch.items[0].product.price_range.minimum_price.regular_price.value;\n \n // 2. Lire prix actuel dans Sheet\n const ss \u003d SpreadsheetApp.openById(SPREADSHEET_ID);\n const sheet \u003d ss.getSheetByName(VINO_SHEET);\n const values \u003d sheet.getDataRange().getValues();\n \n const codebarreClean \u003d codebarre.toString().trim().replace(/^'/, '');\n \n for (let i \u003d 1; i \u003c values.length; i++) {\n const rowCUP \u003d values[i][REF_COLS.CODE_CUP] ? values[i][REF_COLS.CODE_CUP].toString().trim().replace(/^'/, '') : \"\";\n \n if (rowCUP \u003d\u003d\u003d codebarreClean) {\n const prixVino \u003d parseFloat(values[i][REF_COLS.PRIX]) || 0;\n \n // 3. Comparer\n if (Math.abs(prixSAQ - prixVino) \u003e 0.01) {\n // Prix différent - Mettre à jour\n sheet.getRange(i + 1, REF_COLS.PRIX + 1).setValue(parseFloat(prixSAQ));\n \n return {\n updated: true,\n ancienPrix: prixVino,\n nouveauPrix: prixSAQ,\n message: `Prix modifié de ${prixVino.toFixed(2)}$ à ${prixSAQ.toFixed(2)}$`\n };\n } else {\n // Prix identique - Ne rien faire\n return { updated: false };\n }\n }\n }\n \n return { updated: false, message: 'Vin non trouvé dans Vino' };\n \n } catch(e) {\n Logger.log('Erreur vérification prix: ' + e.toString());\n return { updated: false, message: 'Erreur: ' + e.toString() };\n }\n}\n\nfunction TEST_VERIF_PRIX() {\n Logger.log('\u003d\u003d\u003d TEST VÉRIFICATION PRIX \u003d\u003d\u003d');\n \n // Remplace par un vrai code-barres de ton Sheet\n const result \u003d verifierEtMettreAJourPrixSAQ('3765551980160', '14954139');\n \n Logger.log('Résultat: ' + JSON.stringify(result));\n \n Logger.log('\u003d\u003d\u003d FIN TEST \u003d\u003d\u003d');\n}\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n// FIN VÉRIFICATION PRIX - 21 FÉV 2026\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n\nfunction sauvegarderSheet() {\n const ss \u003d SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet();\n const nom \u003d 'Dionysos_Backup_' + Utilities.formatDate(new Date(), 'America/Toronto', 'yyyy-MM-dd');\n const url \u003d 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/' + ss.getId() + '/export?format\u003dxlsx';\n const token \u003d ScriptApp.getOAuthToken();\n const response \u003d UrlFetchApp.fetch(url, {\n headers: { Authorization: 'Bearer ' + token }\n });\n const blob \u003d response.getBlob().setName(nom + '.xlsx');\n GmailApp.sendEmail(\n Session.getActiveUser().getEmail(),\n 'Dionysos — Backup ' + Utilities.formatDate(new Date(), 'America/Toronto', 'yyyy-MM-dd'),\n 'Backup quotidien de ta cave à vin en pièce jointe.',\n { attachments: [blob] }\n );\n Logger.log('Backup envoyé : ' + nom);\n}\n\nfunction creerDeclencheurSauvegarde() {\n ScriptApp.getProjectTriggers().forEach(function(t) {\n if (t.getHandlerFunction() \u003d\u003d\u003d 'sauvegarderSheet') {\n ScriptApp.deleteTrigger(t);\n }\n });\n ScriptApp.newTrigger('sauvegarderSheet')\n .timeBased()\n .everyDays(1)\n .atHour(2)\n .create();\n Logger.log('Déclencheur créé!');\n}\nfunction getCodeBarresFromCodeSAQ(codeSAQ) {\n const ss \u003d SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet();\n const sheet \u003d ss.getSheetByName('Vino');\n const data \u003d sheet.getDataRange().getValues();\n for (let i \u003d 1; i \u003c data.length; i++) {\n if (data[i][1] \u0026\u0026 data[i][1].toString().trim() \u003d\u003d\u003d codeSAQ.toString().trim()) {\n return data[i][0].toString().trim();\n }\n }\n return null;\n}\n\nfunction importerToutesSuccursalesSAQ() {\n try {\n const toutes \u003d {};\n let loaded \u003d 0;\n let continuer \u003d true;\n\n while (continuer) {\n const url \u003d `https://www.saq.com/fr/store/locator/ajaxlist?loaded\u003d${loaded}\u0026_\u003d${Date.now()}`;\n const response \u003d UrlFetchApp.fetch(url, {\n headers: {\n 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0',\n 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'\n },\n muteHttpExceptions: true\n });\n\n const data \u003d JSON.parse(response.getContentText());\n \n data.list.forEach(function(store) {\n if (!toutes[store.identifier]) {\n toutes[store.identifier] \u003d {\n ville: store.city || '',\n numero: store.identifier || '',\n adresse: store.address1 || '',\n codePostal: store.zip || ''\n };\n }\n });\n\n continuer \u003d !data.is_last_page;\n loaded +\u003d 10;\n Utilities.sleep(200);\n }\n\n // Écrire dans Config colonnes K-N\n const ss \u003d SpreadsheetApp.openById(SPREADSHEET_ID);\n const config \u003d ss.getSheetByName('CONFIG');\n const liste \u003d Object.values(toutes).sort(function(a, b) {\n return a.ville.localeCompare(b.ville);\n });\n\n const lastRow \u003d config.getLastRow();\n if (lastRow \u003e 1) {\n config.getRange(2, 11, lastRow - 1, 4).clearContent();\n }\n\n const rows \u003d liste.map(function(s) {\n return [s.ville, s.numero, s.adresse, s.codePostal];\n });\n\n if (rows.length \u003e 0) {\n config.getRange(2, 11, rows.length, 4).setValues(rows);\n }\n\n Logger.log('Total succursales importées: ' + liste.length);\n return liste.length;\n\n } catch(e) {\n Logger.log('Erreur: ' + e.toString());\n return 0;\n }\n}\n\n\nfunction doPost(e) {\n try {\n const params \u003d JSON.parse(e.postData.contents);\n const action \u003d params.action;\n const data \u003d params.data || {};\n\n let result;\n\n switch(action) {\n case 'getInventoryData': result \u003d getInventoryData(); break;\n case 'getConfig': result \u003d getConfig(); break;\n case 'getWineBottles': result \u003d getWineBottles(data.codebarre); break;\n case 'checkWineExists': result \u003d checkWineExists(data.codebarre); break;\n case 'checkLocationAvailable': result \u003d checkLocationAvailable(data.meuble, data.rangee, data.espace); break;\n case 'addBottle': result \u003d addBottle(data); break;\n case 'actionBouteille': result \u003d actionBouteille(data.row, data.action, data); break;\n case 'saveWineEdits': result \u003d saveWineEdits(data); break;\n case 'updateWineField': result \u003d updateWineField(data.codebarre, data.field, data.value); break;\n case 'supprimerBouteille': result \u003d supprimerBouteille(data.row, data.bottle); break;\n case 'mettreBotteilleARanger': result \u003d mettreBotteilleARanger(data.row, data.bottle); break;\n case 'getHistorique': result \u003d getHistorique(); break;\n case 'getSuccursales': result \u003d getSuccursales(); break;\n case 'getToutesSuccursales': result \u003d getToutesSuccursales(); break;\n case 'ajouterSuccursale': result \u003d ajouterSuccursale(data.nom, data.numero); break;\n case 'getSuccursalesDisponibles': result \u003d getSuccursalesDisponibles(data.codeSAQ, data.lat, data.lng); break;\n case 'verifierDispoSAQ_GRAPHQL_V1': result \u003d verifierDispoSAQ_GRAPHQL_V1(data.codeSAQ, data.succursale); break;\n case 'getPromotionsSAQ': result \u003d getPromotionsSAQ(data.codesSAQ); break;\n case 'getToutesPromotionsSAQ': result \u003d getToutesPromotionsSAQ(data.codesSAQ); break;\n case 'getCodeBarresFromCodeSAQ': result \u003d getCodeBarresFromCodeSAQ(data.codeSAQ); break;\n case 'ajouterVinAvecBouteilles': result \u003d ajouterVinAvecBouteilles(data.codebarre, data.codeSAQ, data.note, data.bouteilles, data.nom); break;\n case 'chercherProduitSAQ_GRAPHQL_V1': result \u003d chercherProduitSAQ_GRAPHQL_V1(data.codebarre); break;\n case 'verifierEtMettreAJourPrixSAQ': result \u003d verifierEtMettreAJourPrixSAQ(data.codebarre, data.codeSAQ); break;\n case 'getScannedWinesIncomplete': result \u003d getScannedWinesIncomplete(); break;\n case 'completeScannedWine': result \u003d completeScannedWine(data.row, data.codesaq); break;\n default: result \u003d { error: 'Action inconnue: ' + action };\n }\n\n return ContentService\n .createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ success: true, result: result }))\n .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);\n\n } catch(e) {\n return ContentService\n .createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: e.message }))\n .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);\n }\n}\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n",0,0],["Index",2,"\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e\n\u003chtml\u003e\n\u003chead\u003e\n\u003cbase target\u003d\"_top\"\u003e\n\u003cmeta charset\u003d\"UTF-8\"\u003e\n\u003cmeta name\u003d\"viewport\" content\u003d\"width\u003ddevice-width, initial-scale\u003d1.0, maximum-scale\u003d1.0, user-scalable\u003dno, viewport-fit\u003dcover\"\u003e\n\u003c?!\u003d include('Styles'); ?\u003e\n\u003c/head\u003e\n\u003cbody\u003e\n\n\u003cheader id\u003d\"topNav\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv id\u003d\"burger\" onclick\u003d\"toggleMenu()\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv id\u003d\"searchBtn\" onclick\u003d\"startScanFromHome()\"\u003e\u003cimg src\u003d\"https://i.ibb.co/xqZ284dg/loupe2.png\" alt\u003d\"Recherche\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003ch1 id\u003d\"page-title-nav\" class\u003d\"page-title-nav\"\u003e\u003c/h1\u003e\n\u003c/header\u003e\n\n\n\n\u003cnav id\u003d\"sideMenu\" class\u003d\"side-menu\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"confirm-dialog-close\" onclick\u003d\"closeMenu()\"\u003e✕\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"changeView('accueil');closeMenu()\"\u003eACCUEIL\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"changeView('liste');closeMenu()\"\u003eCAVE A VIN\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"changeView('emplacements');closeMenu()\"\u003eEMPLACEMENTS\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"changeView('historique');closeMenu()\"\u003eHISTORIQUE\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"changeView('racheter');closeMenu()\"\u003eLISTE D'ACHAT\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"changeView('recherche');closeMenu()\"\u003eRECHERCHE\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"changeView('aranger');closeMenu()\"\u003eÀ RANGER\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"changeView('promotions');closeMenu()\"\u003ePROMOTIONS SAQ\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"window.open('https://www.saq.com','_blank');closeMenu()\"\u003eOUVRIR SAQ\u003c/a\u003e\n\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"refreshApp();closeMenu()\"\u003e🔄 RAFRAÎCHIR\u003c/a\u003e\n\n\u003c/nav\u003e\n\n\u003cmain id\u003d\"mainWrapper\"\u003e\n\n\n\u003csection id\u003d\"view-accueil\" class\u003d\"view-section active\"\u003e\n\n \u003c!-- BLOC 1 : Titre --\u003e\n \u003cdiv id\u003d\"view-titre\"\u003e\n \u003ch1 class\u003d\"page-title\"\u003eDIONYSOS\u003c/h1\u003e\n \u003cp class\u003d\"subtitle\"\u003eVIA VINOSTO\u003c/p\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c!-- BLOC 2 : Bouton Cave à vin avec compteur --\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"bloc-niveau-1 mt-20\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv onclick\u003d\"changeView('liste');closeMenu()\" class\u003d\"accueil-cave-btn\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"accueil-cave-label\"\u003eLes vins de Bacchus\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"accueil-separator\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv id\u003d\"total-bouteilles\" class\u003d\"accueil-total-text\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c!-- BLOC 3 : Cépages et Appellations --\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"bloc-niveau-1 mt-20\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv onclick\u003d\"toggleCepagesAccueil()\" class\u003d\"accueil-section-item\"\u003e\n \u003cspan id\u003d\"cepages-count-text\"\u003eCépages\u003c/span\u003e\n \u003cspan id\u003d\"cepages-accueil-arrow\"\u003e▼\u003c/span\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"bloc-niveau-1 mt-20\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv id\u003d\"liste-cepages\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv onclick\u003d\"toggleAppellationsAccueil()\" class\u003d\"accueil-section-item\"\u003e\n \u003cspan id\u003d\"appellations-count-text\"\u003eAppellations\u003c/span\u003e\n \u003cspan id\u003d\"appellations-accueil-arrow\"\u003e▼\u003c/span\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv id\u003d\"liste-appellations\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- BLOC 4 : Saisie manuelle code-barres --\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"bloc-niveau-2 mt-20\" \u003e\n \u003cinput type\u003d\"tel\" id\u003d\"manual-barcode-input\" class\u003d\"filter-input\" placeholder\u003d\"Code-barres...\"\u003e\n \u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"soumettreCodeBarreManuel()\" class\u003d\"btn-primary\" style\u003d\"height:40px;padding:0 15px;font-size:13px;white-space:nowrap;\"\u003eOK\u003c/button\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/section\u003e\n\n\u003csection id\u003d\"view-liste\" class\u003d\"view-section\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"page-header\"\u003e\u003ch1 class\u003d\"page-title\"\u003eLes vins de Bacchus\u003c/h1\u003e\u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"changeView('accueil')\" class\u003d\"btn-close-form\"\u003e✕\u003c/button\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c!-- Filtres avec classes CSS --\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"filter-container\"\u003e\n \u003c!-- Ligne 1 : 5 filtres --\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"filter-row\"\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"filter-couleur\" onchange\u003d\"appliquerFiltres()\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"filter-cepage\" onchange\u003d\"appliquerFiltres()\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"filter-pays\" onchange\u003d\"appliquerFiltres()\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"filter-appellation\" onchange\u003d\"appliquerFiltres()\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"filter-accords\" onchange\u003d\"appliquerFiltres()\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c!-- Ligne de séparation --\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"filter-separator\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c!-- Ligne 2 : Recherche + X --\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"filter-row\"\u003e\n \u003cinput id\u003d\"filter-nom\" type\u003d\"text\" placeholder\u003d\"Rechercher un vin par nom...\" onkeyup\u003d\"rechercherParNom()\" class\u003d\"filter-input\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv onclick\u003d\"reinitialiserFiltres()\" class\u003d\"filter-reset\"\u003e✕\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv id\u003d\"inventory-cards\" class\u003d\"mt-20\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/section\u003e\n\n\u003csection id\u003d\"view-racheter\" class\u003d\"view-section\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"page-header\"\u003e\u003ch1 class\u003d\"filter-container\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"filter-row\"\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"select-succursale\" class\u003d\"filter-select-gros\" style\u003d\"font-size:16px;\" onchange\u003d\"lancerVerificationGraphQL()\"\u003e\n \u003coption value\u003d\"\"\u003eChoisir une succursale...\u003c/option\u003e\n \u003c/select\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n\n onclick\u003d\"document.getElementById('form-succursale').style.display\u003d'block';document.getElementById('btn-ajouter-succursale').style.display\u003d'none';\" class\u003d\"btn-add-bottle\" style\u003d\"margin:10px 15px;box-sizing:border-box;width:calc(100% - 30px);\"\u003e+ AJOUTER UNE SUCCURSALE\u003c/div\u003e\n\n \u003cdiv id\u003d\"form-succursale\" style\u003d\"display:none;margin:10px 15px;padding:20px;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85);border:1px solid rgba(201,129,60,0.3);\"\u003e\n \u003clabel style\u003d\"display:block;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--gold);font-size:14px;\"\u003eNOUVELLE SUCCURSALE\u003c/label\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"select-toutes-succursales\" class\u003d\"filter-select-gros\" style\u003d\"margin-bottom:10px;\" onchange\u003d\"remplirSuccursaleSelectionnee()\"\u003e\n \u003coption value\u003d\"\"\u003eChoisir une succursale...\u003c/option\u003e\n \u003c/select\u003e\n \u003cdiv style\u003d\"display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;\"\u003e\n \u003cinput type\u003d\"text\" id\u003d\"new-succursale-nom\" placeholder\u003d\"Nom\" style\u003d\"height:36px;padding:0 15px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(201,129,60,0.4);color:var(--white);font-size:12px;\"\u003e\n \u003cinput type\u003d\"text\" id\u003d\"new-succursale-numero\" placeholder\u003d\"Numéro\" style\u003d\"height:36px;padding:0 15px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(201,129,60,0.4);color:var(--white);font-size:12px;\"\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv style\u003d\"display:flex;gap:10px;\"\u003e\n \u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"sauvegarderSuccursale()\" class\u003d\"btn-primary\" style\u003d\"flex:1;height:36px;font-size:12px;padding:0 10px;\"\u003eAJOUTER\u003c/button\u003e\n \u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"document.getElementById('form-succursale').style.display\u003d'none';document.getElementById('btn-ajouter-succursale').style.display\u003d'block';\" class\u003d\"btn-secondary\" style\u003d\"flex:1;height:36px;font-size:12px;padding:0 10px;\"\u003eANNULER\u003c/button\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n\n \u003cdiv id\u003d\"dispo-status\" class\u003d\"btn-close-form\"\u003e✕\u003c/button\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"filter-container\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"filter-row\"\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"filter-meuble-emp\" onchange\u003d\"appliquerFiltresEmplacements()\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"filter-rangee-emp\" onchange\u003d\"appliquerFiltresEmplacements()\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"filter-espace-emp\" onchange\u003d\"appliquerFiltresEmplacements()\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003cdiv onclick\u003d\"reinitialiserFiltresEmplacements()\" class\u003d\"filter-reset\"\u003e✕\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv id\u003d\"emplacements-table\" class\u003d\"mt-20\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/section\u003e\n\n\u003csection id\u003d\"view-completer\" class\u003d\"view-section\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"page-header\"\u003e\u003ch1 class\u003d\"page-title\"\u003eÀ COMPLETER\u003c/h1\u003e\u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"changeView('accueil')\" class\u003d\"btn-close-form\"\u003e✕\u003c/button\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv id\u003d\"completer-list\" class\u003d\"mt-20\" style\u003d\"padding:0 10px\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/section\u003e\n\n\u003csection id\u003d\"view-recherche\" class\u003d\"view-section\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"page-header\"\u003e\u003ch1 class\u003d\"page-title\"\u003eRECHERCHE AVANCÉE\u003c/h1\u003e\u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"changeView('accueil')\" class\u003d\"btn-close-form\"\u003e✕\u003c/button\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"bloc-niveau-2\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"succursale-inputs\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv\u003e\n \u003clabel\u003eClassification\u003c/label\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"search-classification\" class\u003d\"filter-select\" \u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv\u003e\n \u003clabel\u003eParticularité\u003c/label\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"search-particularite\" class\u003d\"filter-select\" \u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv\u003e\n \u003clabel\u003eProducteur\u003c/label\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"search-producteur\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv\u003e\n \u003clabel\u003eAgent promo\u003c/label\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"search-agent\" class\u003d\"filter-select\" \u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv\u003e\n \u003clabel\u003eArômes\u003c/label\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"search-aromes\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv\u003e\n \u003clabel\u003eAcidité\u003c/label\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"search-acidite\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv\u003e\n \u003clabel\u003eSucrosité\u003c/label\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"search-sucrosite\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv\u003e\n \u003clabel\u003eCorps\u003c/label\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"search-corps\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv\u003e\n \u003clabel\u003eBouche\u003c/label\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"search-bouche\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv\u003e\n \u003clabel\u003eDivers\u003c/label\u003e\n \u003cselect id\u003d\"search-divers\" class\u003d\"filter-select\"\u003e\u003c/select\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n\n \u003cdiv style\u003d\"display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:20px;\"\u003e\n \u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"executeSearch()\" class\u003d\"btn-primary\" style\u003d\"flex:1;\"\u003eRECHERCHER\u003c/button\u003e\n \u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"resetSearch()\" class\u003d\"filter-reset\" style\u003d\"width:50px;border:1px solid rgba(201,129,60,0.3);\"\u003e✕\u003c/button\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n\n \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/section\u003e\n\n\u003csection id\u003d\"view-historique\" class\u003d\"view-section\"\u003e\n\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"page-header\"\u003e\u003ch1 class\u003d\"page-title\"\u003eHISTORIQUE\u003c/h1\u003e\u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"changeView('accueil')\" class\u003d\"btn-close-form\"\u003e✕\u003c/button\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"filter-container\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"filter-row\"\u003e\n \u003cinput id\u003d\"search-plat\" type\u003d\"text\" placeholder\u003d\"Rechercher un plat...\" onkeyup\u003d\"filtrerHistoriqueParPlat()\" class\u003d\"filter-input\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv onclick\u003d\"reinitialiserRechercheHistorique()\" class\u003d\"filter-reset\"\u003e✕\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003cdiv id\u003d\"historique-list\" class\u003d\"mt-20\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/section\u003e\n\n\u003c/main\u003e\n\n\n\n\u003cdiv id\u003d\"completeScannedOverlay\" class\u003d\"overlay-popup\" style\u003d\"display:none\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"popup-window\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"popup-header\"\u003e\u003ch2 class\u003d\"popup-title\"\u003eCOMPLÉTER LE VIN\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"closeCompleteScannedPopup()\" class\u003d\"btn-close-form\"\u003e✕\u003c/button\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"popup-content\"\u003e\n\u003cinput type\u003d\"hidden\" id\u003d\"complete-row\"\u003e\n\u003cinput type\u003d\"hidden\" id\u003d\"complete-codebarre\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"field-container\"\u003e\u003clabel\u003eCODE-BARRES\u003c/label\u003e\u003cinput id\u003d\"complete-codebarre-display\" type\u003d\"text\" readonly style\u003d\"background:rgba(230,161,0,0.1);color:var(--white);border:none;\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"field-container\"\u003e\u003clabel\u003eCODE SAQ\u003c/label\u003e\n\u003cdiv style\u003d\"display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:stretch;\"\u003e\n\u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"ouvrirPageSAQFromComplete()\" style\u003d\"width:100px;height:50px;background:var(--gold);color:#000;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0;\"\u003eGO SAQ\u003c/button\u003e\n\u003cinput type\u003d\"text\" id\u003d\"complete-codesaq\" placeholder\u003d\"Copiez le code SAQ...\" style\u003d\"flex:1;height:50px;padding:0 15px;font-size:16px;color:#fff;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(230,161,0,0.3);\"\u003e\n\u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"saveCompleteScanned()\" class\u003d\"btn-primary\" style\u003d\"width:100px;height:50px;padding:0;font-size:16px;flex-shrink:0;\"\u003eGO\u003c/button\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"field-container\" style\u003d\"margin-top:20px;padding-top:15px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\"\u003e\u003clabel\u003eNOTE\u003c/label\u003e\u003cinput id\u003d\"complete-note-display\" type\u003d\"text\" readonly style\u003d\"background:transparent;border:none;color:var(--white-60);font-size:13px;padding:0;height:auto;\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003cdiv id\u003d\"ficheVinOverlay\" class\u003d\"fichevin-overlay\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv id\u003d\"fichevin-window-inner\" class\u003d\"fichevin-window\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"fichevin-header\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv\u003e\n \u003ch2 id\u003d\"fiche-nom\" class\u003d\"fv-title\"\u003eNOM DU VIN\u003c/h2\u003e\n \u003cdiv id\u003d\"fiche-origine\" class\u003d\"fv-origine\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"fiche-header-actions\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"succursale-form-actions\"\u003e\n \u003cbutton id\u003d\"btn-edit-fiche\" onclick\u003d\"toggleEditMode()\" class\u003d\"fiche-icon-btn edit\"\u003e✎\u003c/button\u003e\n \u003cbutton id\u003d\"btn-save-fiche\" onclick\u003d\"saveFiche()\" class\u003d\"fiche-icon-btn save\" style\u003d\"display:none;\"\u003e✓\u003c/button\u003e\n \u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"fermerFiche()\" class\u003d\"fiche-icon-btn\"\u003e✕\u003c/button\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv id\u003d\"fiche-prix-header\" style\u003d\"font-size:14px;font-weight:300;color:#c9813c;\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv id\u003d\"fiche-photo\" style\u003d\"text-align:right;margin:1px 0;\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003cdiv id\u003d\"fiche-content\"\u003eChargement...\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003cdiv id\u003d\"newWineOverlay\" class\u003d\"overlay-popup\" style\u003d\"display:none\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"popup-window\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"popup-header\"\u003e\n \u003ch2 class\u003d\"popup-title\"\u003eNOUVEAU VIN SCANNÉ\u003c/h2\u003e\n \u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"closeNewWinePopup()\" class\u003d\"btn-close-form\"\u003e✕\u003c/button\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"popup-content\"\u003e\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"field-container\"\u003e\n \u003clabel\u003eCODE-BARRES\u003c/label\u003e\n \u003cdiv style\u003d\"display:flex;gap:8px;\"\u003e\n \u003cinput id\u003d\"newwine-codebarre\" type\u003d\"text\" placeholder\u003d\"Ex: 0012345678901\" style\u003d\"flex:1\"\u003e\n \u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"startScanFromPopup()\" class\u003d\"btn-scan\"\u003eSCAN\u003c/button\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"field-container\"\u003e\n \u003clabel\u003eNOTE\u003c/label\u003e\n \u003ctextarea id\u003d\"newwine-note\" rows\u003d\"3\" placeholder\u003d\"Notes...\"\u003e\u003c/textarea\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"field-container\"\u003e\n \u003clabel\u003eQUANTITÉ\u003c/label\u003e\n \u003cdiv style\u003d\"display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;\"\u003e\n \u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"adjustQuantity(-1)\" class\u003d\"btn-secondary\" style\u003d\"width:50px;height:45px;\"\u003e−\u003c/button\u003e\n \u003cinput id\u003d\"newwine-quantite\" type\u003d\"number\" value\u003d\"1\" readonly style\u003d\"text-align:center;width:80px;height:45px;\"\u003e\n \u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"adjustQuantity(1)\" class\u003d\"btn-secondary\" style\u003d\"width:50px;height:45px;\"\u003e+\u003c/button\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \n \u003cdiv id\u003d\"emplacements-container\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"popup-actions\"\u003e\n \u003cbutton id\u003d\"btn-save-newwine\" onclick\u003d\"saveNewWineImproved()\" class\u003d\"btn-primary\"\u003eGO\u003c/button\u003e\n \u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"closeNewWinePopup()\" class\u003d\"btn-secondary\"\u003eANNULER\u003c/button\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003cdiv id\u003d\"edit-fiche-popup\" class\u003d\"overlay-popup\" style\u003d\"left:0;right:0;width:100vw;\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\n\n\u003cdiv id\u003d\"scannerContainer\" class\u003d\"scanner-container\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv id\u003d\"scanner-box\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv id\u003d\"interactive\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"laser-line\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"scanner-controls\"\u003e\n\u003cp class\u003d\"scanner-help\"\u003eAlignez le code-barres avec la ligne\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cbutton type\u003d\"button\" class\u003d\"btn-secondary\" onclick\u003d\"stopScanner()\"\u003eANNULER LE SCAN\u003c/button\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003cscript src\u003d\"https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/quagga/0.12.1/quagga.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\n\u003c?!\u003d include('scripts-clean'); ?\u003e\n\u003c/body\u003e\n\u003c/html\u003e",0,0],["scripts-clean",2,"\u003cscript\u003e\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n SCRIPTS DIONYSOS — VERSION NETTOYÉE ET FRANCISÉE\n Organisation: Init -\u003e Inventaire -\u003e Fiche -\u003e Actions -\u003e Scanner -\u003e Listes -\u003e Filtres -\u003e Utilitaires\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d VARIABLES GLOBALES \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\nlet CONFIG \u003d null; // Configuration (meubles, pays, cépages, accords)\nlet ALL_DATA \u003d []; // Toutes les bouteilles chargées\nlet CURRENT_WINE_CODEBARRE \u003d null; // Code-barres du vin actuellement ouvert\nlet FILTRE_CEPAGE_EN_ATTENTE \u003d null; // Filtre cépage à appliquer après chargement\nlet RESULTATS_RECHERCHE_EN_ATTENTE \u003d null; // Résultats de recherche avancée en attente\nlet FILTRE_APPELLATION_EN_ATTENTE \u003d null; // Filtre appellation à appliquer après chargement\nlet CURRENT_WINE_DATA \u003d null; // Données du vin actuellement ouvert en fiche\nlet CURRENT_WINE_BOTTLES \u003d []; // Bouteilles du vin actuellement ouvert en fiche\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d INITIALISATION \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\nwindow.onload \u003d function() {\n google.script.run.withSuccessHandler(initConfig).getConfig();\n chargerInventaire();\n};\n\nfunction initConfig(cfg) {\n CONFIG \u003d cfg;\n}\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d NAVIGATION ET CHANGEMENT DE VUE \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\nfunction changeView(viewName) {\n document.querySelectorAll('.view-section').forEach(function(v) { v.classList.remove('active'); });\n document.getElementById('view-' + viewName).classList.add('active');\n closeMenu();\n\n if (window.history.state?.view !\u003d\u003d viewName) {\n window.history.pushState({ view: viewName }, '', '#' + viewName);\n }\n\n const titleNav \u003d document.getElementById('page-title-nav');\n\n // Titres affichés dans la barre de navigation selon la vue\n const titresVues \u003d {\n 'accueil': '',\n 'liste': 'CAVE À VIN',\n 'racheter': 'LISTE D\\'ACHAT',\n 'aranger': 'À RANGER',\n 'completer': 'À COMPLÉTER',\n 'emplacements': 'EMPLACEMENTS',\n 'recherche': 'RECHERCHE',\n 'historique': 'HISTORIQUE'\n };\n titleNav.textContent \u003d titresVues[viewName] || '';\n\n if (viewName \u003d\u003d\u003d 'liste') {\n chargerInventaire();\n if (!FILTRE_CEPAGE_EN_ATTENTE \u0026\u0026 !RESULTATS_RECHERCHE_EN_ATTENTE) {\n reinitialiserFiltres();\n }\n }\n if (viewName \u003d\u003d\u003d 'racheter') chargerListeRacheter();\n if (viewName \u003d\u003d\u003d 'aranger') chargerListeARanger();\n if (viewName \u003d\u003d\u003d 'completer') chargerListeACompleter();\n if (viewName \u003d\u003d\u003d 'emplacements') chargerEmplacements();\n if (viewName \u003d\u003d\u003d 'recherche') chargerPageRecherche();\n if (viewName \u003d\u003d\u003d 'historique') chargerHistorique();\n if (viewName \u003d\u003d\u003d 'promotions') chargerPromotions();\n}\n\n// Gérer le bouton retour du navigateur\nwindow.addEventListener('popstate', function(event) {\n if (event.state \u0026\u0026 event.state.view) {\n const viewName \u003d event.state.view;\n document.querySelectorAll('.view-section').forEach(function(v) { v.classList.remove('active'); });\n document.getElementById('view-' + viewName).classList.add('active');\n if (viewName \u003d\u003d\u003d 'liste') chargerInventaire();\n if (viewName \u003d\u003d\u003d 'historique') chargerHistorique();\n if (viewName \u003d\u003d\u003d 'emplacements') chargerEmplacements();\n }\n});\n\nwindow.history.replaceState({ view: 'accueil' }, '', '#accueil');\n\nfunction toggleMenu() {\n document.getElementById(\"burger\").classList.toggle(\"open\");\n document.getElementById(\"sideMenu\").classList.toggle(\"open\");\n}\n\nfunction closeMenu() {\n document.getElementById(\"sideMenu\").classList.remove(\"open\");\n document.getElementById(\"burger\").classList.remove(\"open\");\n}\n\nfunction refreshApp() {\n afficherMessage('Synchronisation...');\n chargerInventaire();\n\n const activeView \u003d document.querySelector('.view-section.active');\n if (activeView) {\n const viewId \u003d activeView.id.replace('view-', '');\n if (viewId \u003d\u003d\u003d 'racheter') chargerListeRacheter();\n if (viewId \u003d\u003d\u003d 'aranger') chargerListeARanger();\n if (viewId \u003d\u003d\u003d 'completer') chargerListeACompleter();\n if (viewId \u003d\u003d\u003d 'emplacements') chargerEmplacements();\n if (viewId \u003d\u003d\u003d 'historique') chargerHistorique();\n }\ncard\n setTimeout(function() { afficherMessage('✓ Synchronisé'); }, 500);\n}\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d INVENTAIRE — CHARGEMENT ET AFFICHAGE DES VINS \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\nfunction chargerInventaire() {\n const div \u003d document.getElementById(\"inventory-cards\");\n if (!div) return;\n div.innerHTML \u003d \"\u003cp class\u003d'text-center p-15 color-muted'\u003eSYNCHRONISATION...\u003c/p\u003e\";\n google.script.run.withSuccessHandler(inventaireCharge).getInventoryData();\n}\n\nfunction inventaireCharge(data) {\n ALL_DATA \u003d data || [];\n afficherCartes(ALL_DATA);\n remplirFiltres(ALL_DATA);\n mettreAJourStatsAccueil();\n chargerPageRecherche();\n\n // Appliquer les filtres en attente s'il y en a\n if (FILTRE_CEPAGE_EN_ATTENTE) {\n document.getElementById('filter-cepage').value \u003d FILTRE_CEPAGE_EN_ATTENTE;\n FILTRE_CEPAGE_EN_ATTENTE \u003d null;\n appliquerFiltres();\n return;\n }\n\n if (FILTRE_APPELLATION_EN_ATTENTE) {\n document.getElementById('filter-appellation').value \u003d FILTRE_APPELLATION_EN_ATTENTE;\n FILTRE_APPELLATION_EN_ATTENTE \u003d null;\n appliquerFiltres();\n return;\n }\n\n if (RESULTATS_RECHERCHE_EN_ATTENTE) {\n afficherCartes(RESULTATS_RECHERCHE_EN_ATTENTE);\n RESULTATS_RECHERCHE_EN_ATTENTE \u003d null;\n }\n}\n\nfunction mettreAJourStatsAccueil() {\n if (!ALL_DATA) return;\n\n const actives \u003d ALL_DATA.filter(function(item) {\n const statut \u003d item.Statut || \"En stock\";\n return statut !\u003d\u003d \"Bu\" \u0026\u0026 statut !\u003d\u003d \"Sorti\";\n });\n\n document.getElementById('total-bouteilles').textContent \u003d actives.length + ' bouteille' + (actives.length \u003e 1 ? 's' : '') + ' en inventaire';\n\n // Compter par cépage\n const cepageCounts \u003d {};\n actives.forEach(function(item) {\n const cepages \u003d item.Cepage || '';\n if (cepages) {\n const liste \u003d cepages.split(',').map(function(c) { return c.trim(); }).filter(Boolean);\n liste.forEach(function(cepage) {\n cepageCounts[cepage] \u003d (cepageCounts[cepage] || 0) + 1;\n });\n }\n });\n\n const totalCepages \u003d Object.keys(cepageCounts).length;\n document.getElementById('cepages-count-text').textContent \u003d totalCepages + ' cépage' + (totalCepages \u003e 1 ? 's' : '');\n\n const sorted \u003d Object.entries(cepageCounts).sort(function(a, b) { return b[1] - a[1]; });\n\n const divCep \u003d document.getElementById('liste-cepages');\n divCep.innerHTML \u003d '';\n divCep.style.display \u003d 'none';\n\n sorted.forEach(function(entry) {\n const cepage \u003d entry[0];\n const count \u003d entry[1];\n divCep.innerHTML +\u003d '\u003cdiv onclick\u003d\"filtrerParCepage(\\'' + cepage.replace(/'/g, \"\\\\'\") + '\\')\" class\u003d\"card-cepage-item\"\u003e\u003cspan\u003e' + cepage + '\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class\u003d\"card-cepage-count\"\u003e' + count + '\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/div\u003e';\n });\n\n // Compter par appellation\n const appellationCounts \u003d {};\n actives.forEach(function(item) {\n const appellation \u003d item.Appellation || '';\n if (appellation) {\n appellationCounts[appellation] \u003d (appellationCounts[appellation] || 0) + 1;\n }\n });\n\n const totalAppellations \u003d Object.keys(appellationCounts).length;\n document.getElementById('appellations-count-text').textContent \u003d totalAppellations + ' appellation' + (totalAppellations \u003e 1 ? 's' : '');\n\n const sortedAppellations \u003d Object.entries(appellationCounts).sort(function(a, b) { return b[1] - a[1]; });\n\n const divApp \u003d document.getElementById('liste-appellations');\n divApp.innerHTML \u003d '';\n divApp.style.display \u003d 'none';\n\n sortedAppellations.forEach(function(entry) {\n const appellation \u003d entry[0];\n const count \u003d entry[1];\n divApp.innerHTML +\u003d '\u003cdiv onclick\u003d\"filtrerParAppellation(\\'' + appellation.replace(/'/g, \"\\\\'\") + '\\')\" class\u003d\"card-cepage-item\"\u003e\u003cspan\u003e' + appellation + '\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class\u003d\"card-cepage-count\"\u003e' + count + '\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/div\u003e';\n });\n}\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\nfunction toggleCepagesAccueil() {\n const liste \u003d document.getElementById('liste-cepages');\n const arrow \u003d document.getElementById('cepages-accueil-arrow');\n const listeApp \u003d document.getElementById('liste-appellations');\n const arrowApp \u003d document.getElementById('appellations-accueil-arrow');\n\n // Fermer les appellations si ouvertes\n listeApp.style.display \u003d 'none';\n if (arrowApp) arrowApp.textContent \u003d '▼';\n\n // Basculer les cépages\n if (liste.style.display \u003d\u003d\u003d 'none' || liste.style.display \u003d\u003d\u003d '') {\n liste.style.display \u003d 'block';\n if (arrow) arrow.textContent \u003d '▲';\n } else {\n liste.style.display \u003d 'none';\n if (arrow) arrow.textContent \u003d '▼';\n }\n}\n\nfunction toggleAppellationsAccueil() {\n const liste \u003d document.getElementById('liste-appellations');\n const arrow \u003d document.getElementById('appellations-accueil-arrow');\n const listeCep \u003d document.getElementById('liste-cepages');\n const arrowCep \u003d document.getElementById('cepages-accueil-arrow');\n\n // Fermer les cépages si ouverts\n listeCep.style.display \u003d 'none';\n if (arrowCep) arrowCep.textContent \u003d '▼';\n\n // Basculer les appellations\n if (liste.style.display \u003d\u003d\u003d 'none' || liste.style.display \u003d\u003d\u003d '') {\n liste.style.display \u003d 'block';\n if (arrow) arrow.textContent \u003d '▲';\n } else {\n liste.style.display \u003d 'none';\n if (arrow) arrow.textContent \u003d '▼';\n }\n}\n\n// Filtre la liste par appellation depuis l'accueil\nfunction filtrerParAppellation(appellation) {\n FILTRE_APPELLATION_EN_ATTENTE \u003d appellation;\n changeView('liste');\n closeMenu();\n}\n\n// Filtre la liste par cépage depuis l'accueil\nfunction filtrerParCepage(cepage) {\n FILTRE_CEPAGE_EN_ATTENTE \u003d cepage;\n changeView('liste');\n closeMenu();\n}\n\nfunction chargerPageRecherche() {\n if (!ALL_DATA || ALL_DATA.length \u003d\u003d\u003d 0) return;\n\n const fields \u003d [\n { id: 'search-classification', key: 'Classification' },\n { id: 'search-particularite', key: 'Particularité' },\n { id: 'search-producteur', key: 'Producteur' },\n { id: 'search-agent', key: 'Agent promo' },\n { id: 'search-aromes', key: 'Arômes' },\n { id: 'search-acidite', key: 'Acidité' },\n { id: 'search-sucrosite', key: 'Sucrosité' },\n { id: 'search-corps', key: 'Corps' },\n { id: 'search-bouche', key: 'Bouche' },\n { id: 'search-divers', key: 'Divers' }\n ];\n\n fields.forEach(function(field) {\n const values \u003d new Set();\n ALL_DATA.forEach(function(item) {\n const val \u003d item[field.key];\n if (val \u0026\u0026 val.toString().trim() !\u003d\u003d '') values.add(val.toString().trim());\n });\n\n const select \u003d document.getElementById(field.id);\n if (select) {\n select.innerHTML \u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"\"\u003e-- Tous --\u003c/option\u003e';\n Array.from(values).sort().forEach(function(v) {\n select.innerHTML +\u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"' + v.replace(/\"/g, '\u0026quot;') + '\"\u003e' + v + '\u003c/option\u003e';\n });\n }\n });\n}\n\n\nfunction chargerPromotions() {\n const div \u003d document.getElementById('promotions-list');\n if (!div) return;\n div.innerHTML \u003d \"\u003cp class\u003d'text-center p-15 color-muted'\u003eChargement des promotions...\u003c/p\u003e\";\n\n google.script.run\n .withSuccessHandler(function(succursales) {\n const select \u003d document.getElementById('select-succursale-promo');\n if (select) {\n select.innerHTML \u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"\"\u003eChoisir une succursale...\u003c/option\u003e';\n succursales.forEach(function(s) {\n select.innerHTML +\u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"' + s.numero + '\"\u003e' + s.nom + '\u003c/option\u003e';\n });\n }\n })\n .getSuccursales();\n\n const codesSAQ \u003d [];\n ALL_DATA.forEach(function(item) {\n const codeSAQ \u003d item['Code SAQ'];\n if (codeSAQ \u0026\u0026 !codesSAQ.includes(codeSAQ.toString())) {\n codesSAQ.push(codeSAQ.toString());\n }\n });\n\n google.script.run\n .withSuccessHandler(function(promos) {\n afficherPromotions(promos || []);\n // Charger autres promos ensuite\n google.script.run\n .withSuccessHandler(function(autresPromos) {\n afficherAutresPromotions(autresPromos || []);\n })\n .getToutesPromotionsSAQ(codesSAQ);\n })\n .getPromotionsSAQ(codesSAQ);\n}\n\nfunction afficherAutresPromotions(promos) {\n const div \u003d document.getElementById('promotions-list');\n if (!div || promos.length \u003d\u003d\u003d 0) return;\n\n let html \u003d '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"margin-top:20px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.4);padding:15px;\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv onclick\u003d\"basculerAutresPromos()\" class\u003d\"collapsible-header\"\u003eDÉCOUVRIR D\\'AUTRES VINS EN PROMOTION (' + promos.length + ')\u003cspan id\u003d\"autres-promos-arrow\"\u003e▼\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/div\u003e';\n\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv id\u003d\"autres-promos-details\" style\u003d\"display:none;margin-top:10px;\"\u003e';\n\n // Filtres\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:15px;\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cselect id\u003d\"filtre-couleur-promo\" onchange\u003d\"filtrerAutresPromos()\" class\u003d\"filter-select\" style\u003d\"flex:1;border:1px solid rgba(201,129,60,0.3);\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"\"\u003eToutes couleurs\u003c/option\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"Rouge\"\u003eRouge\u003c/option\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"Blanc\"\u003eBlanc\u003c/option\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"Rosé\"\u003eRosé\u003c/option\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003c/select\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cselect id\u003d\"filtre-prix-promo\" onchange\u003d\"filtrerAutresPromos()\" class\u003d\"filter-select\" style\u003d\"flex:1;border:1px solid rgba(201,129,60,0.3);\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"\"\u003eTous prix\u003c/option\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"15\"\u003eMoins de 15$\u003c/option\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"25\"\u003e15$ à 25$\u003c/option\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"99\"\u003e25$+\u003c/option\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003c/select\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e';\n\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv id\u003d\"autres-promos-liste\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/div\u003e';\n\n div.innerHTML +\u003d html;\n\n // Stocker les promos pour les filtres\n window.AUTRES_PROMOS \u003d promos;\n filtrerAutresPromos();\n}\n\nfunction basculerAutresPromos() {\n const details \u003d document.getElementById('autres-promos-details');\n const arrow \u003d document.getElementById('autres-promos-arrow');\n if (details.style.display \u003d\u003d\u003d 'none') {\n details.style.display \u003d 'block';\n if (arrow) arrow.textContent \u003d '▲';\n } else {\n details.style.display \u003d 'none';\n if (arrow) arrow.textContent \u003d '▼';\n }\n}\n\nfunction filtrerAutresPromos() {\n const couleur \u003d document.getElementById('filtre-couleur-promo').value;\n const prix \u003d document.getElementById('filtre-prix-promo').value;\n const liste \u003d document.getElementById('autres-promos-liste');\n if (!liste) return;\n\n let filtered \u003d window.AUTRES_PROMOS || [];\n\n if (couleur) filtered \u003d filtered.filter(function(p) { return p.couleur \u003d\u003d\u003d couleur; });\n if (prix \u003d\u003d\u003d '15') filtered \u003d filtered.filter(function(p) { return p.prixFinal \u003c 15; });\n if (prix \u003d\u003d\u003d '25') filtered \u003d filtered.filter(function(p) { return p.prixFinal \u003e\u003d 15 \u0026\u0026 p.prixFinal \u003c\u003d 25; });\n if (prix \u003d\u003d\u003d '99') filtered \u003d filtered.filter(function(p) { return p.prixFinal \u003e 25; });\n\n liste.innerHTML \u003d '';\n filtered.forEach(function(promo) {\n liste.innerHTML +\u003d\n '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"padding:12px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);cursor:pointer;\" onclick\u003d\"window.open(\\'https://www.saq.com/fr/' + promo.codeSAQ + '\\', \\'_blank\\')\"\u003e' +\n '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"font-size:13px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:5px;\"\u003e' + promo.nom + '\u003c/div\u003e' +\n '\u003cdiv\u003e' +\n '\u003cspan style\u003d\"text-decoration:line-through;color:var(--white-50);font-size:12px;\"\u003e' + promo.prixRegulier.toFixed(2) + '$\u003c/span\u003e ' +\n '\u003cspan style\u003d\"color:var(--gold);font-size:14px;font-weight:600;\"\u003e' + promo.prixFinal.toFixed(2) + '$\u003c/span\u003e ' +\n '\u003cspan style\u003d\"color:#4caf50;font-size:11px;\"\u003e(-' + promo.rabais.toFixed(2) + '$)\u003c/span\u003e' +\n (promo.couleur ? ' \u003cspan style\u003d\"color:var(--white-50);font-size:11px;\"\u003e• ' + promo.couleur + '\u003c/span\u003e' : '') +\n '\u003c/div\u003e' +\n '\u003c/div\u003e';\n });\n\n if (filtered.length \u003d\u003d\u003d 0) {\n liste.innerHTML \u003d '\u003cp style\u003d\"color:var(--white-50);font-size:13px;text-align:center;padding:15px;\"\u003eAucun résultat\u003c/p\u003e';\n }\n}\n\nfunction rafraichirDispoPromos() {\n const cards \u003d document.querySelectorAll('[id^\u003d\"dispo-promo-\"]');\n cards.forEach(function(div) {\n const codeSAQ \u003d div.id.replace('dispo-promo-', '');\n chargerDispoPromo(codeSAQ);\n });\n}\n\n\n\nfunction afficherPromotions(promos) {\n const div \u003d document.getElementById('promotions-list');\n if (!div) return;\n\n div.innerHTML \u003d '\u003cp style\u003d\"font-size:12px;color:var(--white-50);text-align:center;margin-bottom:15px;\"\u003e' + promos.length + ' vin' + (promos.length \u003e 1 ? 's' : '') + ' en promotion cette semaine\u003c/p\u003e';\n div.innerHTML +\u003d '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;padding:0 15px;\"\u003e';\n\n promos.forEach(function(promo) {\n const codeSAQ \u003d promo.codeSAQ;\n\n let prixHTML \u003d '';\n if (promo.rabais \u003e 0) {\n prixHTML \u003d '\u003cspan style\u003d\"text-decoration:line-through;color:var(--white-50);font-size:11px;\"\u003e' + promo.prixRegulier.toFixed(2) + '$\u003c/span\u003e ';\n prixHTML +\u003d '\u003cspan style\u003d\"color:var(--gold);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;\"\u003e' + promo.prixFinal.toFixed(2) + '$\u003c/span\u003e';\n } else {\n prixHTML \u003d '\u003cspan style\u003d\"color:var(--white);font-size:13px;\"\u003e' + promo.prixFinal.toFixed(2) + '$\u003c/span\u003e';\n }\n if (promo.pointsBonis \u003e 0) {\n prixHTML +\u003d ' \u003cimg src\u003d\"https://www.saq.com/build/store/images/store-promotion/icon-bubbles-inspire.png?v\u003d9a65f0ab4865e71a0ebb25822171c241441d280738fc7428df68bb1c7f17cab57c1ba6a8297720ab2f581c27dc0b115efe165467a4ec0dca4a8e5821c9ac6f41\" style\u003d\"width:14px;height:auto;vertical-align:middle;\"\u003e \u003cspan style\u003d\"color:var(--gold);font-size:11px;\"\u003e' + promo.pointsBonis + ' pts\u003c/span\u003e';\n }\n\n div.innerHTML +\u003d\n '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"background:var(--bg-card);padding:10px;\"\u003e' +\n '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"font-size:12px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;margin-bottom:6px;line-height:1.3;cursor:pointer;\" onclick\u003d\"event.stopPropagation();ouvrirFicheVinParCodeSAQ(\\'' + codeSAQ + '\\')\"\u003e' + promo.nom + '\u003c/div\u003e' +\n '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"margin-bottom:6px;\"\u003e' + prixHTML + '\u003c/div\u003e' +\n '\u003cdiv id\u003d\"dispo-promo-' + codeSAQ + '\" style\u003d\"font-size:11px;color:var(--white-50);margin-bottom:6px;\"\u003e📍 Choisir une succursale...\u003c/div\u003e' +\n '\u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"event.stopPropagation();voirSuccursalesPromo(\\'' + codeSAQ + '\\')\" style\u003d\"background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(201,129,60,0.3);color:var(--white-50);padding:4px 8px;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;width:100%;\"\u003eToutes les succursales\u003c/button\u003e' +\n '\u003c/div\u003e';\n\n chargerDispoPromo(codeSAQ);\n });\n\n div.innerHTML +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e';\n}\n\nfunction chargerDispoPromo(codeSAQ) {\n const succursales \u003d document.getElementById('select-succursale-promo');\n const codeSuccursale \u003d succursales ? succursales.value : '';\n const divDispo \u003d document.getElementById('dispo-promo-' + codeSAQ);\n\n if (!codeSuccursale || !divDispo) {\n if (divDispo) divDispo.innerHTML \u003d '';\n return;\n }\n\n google.script.run\n .withSuccessHandler(function(result) {\n if (!divDispo) return;\n if (result.disponible) {\n const nomSuccursale \u003d succursales.options[succursales.selectedIndex].text;\n divDispo.innerHTML \u003d '📍 ' + (result.quantite ? result.quantite + ' bouteilles disponibles à ' + nomSuccursale : 'Disponible à ' + nomSuccursale);\n divDispo.style.color \u003d '#4caf50';\n } else {\n const nomSuccursale \u003d succursales.options[succursales.selectedIndex].text;\n divDispo.innerHTML \u003d '📍 Non disponible à ' + nomSuccursale;\n divDispo.style.color \u003d '#f44336';\n }\n })\n .verifierDispoSAQ_GRAPHQL_V1(codeSAQ, codeSuccursale);\n}\n\nfunction voirSuccursalesPromo(codeSAQ) {\n const div \u003d document.getElementById('dispo-promo-' + codeSAQ);\n if (!div) return;\n div.innerHTML \u003d '📍 Recherche en cours...';\n\n navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(\n function(position) {\n google.script.run\n .withSuccessHandler(function(succursales) {\n if (!succursales || succursales.length \u003d\u003d\u003d 0) {\n div.innerHTML \u003d '📍 Aucune succursale disponible';\n return;\n }\n let html \u003d '';\n succursales.slice(0, 5).forEach(function(s) {\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"padding:3px 0;font-size:11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cspan style\u003d\"color:var(--white-70);\"\u003e' + s.nom + '\u003c/span\u003e';\n html +\u003d ' \u003cspan style\u003d\"color:var(--gold);\"\u003e' + s.quantite + ' btl\u003c/span\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e';\n });\n div.innerHTML \u003d html;\n })\n .getSuccursalesDisponibles(codeSAQ, position.coords.latitude, position.coords.longitude);\n },\n function() {\n google.script.run\n .withSuccessHandler(function(succursales) {\n if (!succursales || succursales.length \u003d\u003d\u003d 0) {\n div.innerHTML \u003d '📍 Aucune succursale disponible';\n return;\n }\n let html \u003d '';\n succursales.slice(0, 5).forEach(function(s) {\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"padding:3px 0;font-size:11px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cspan style\u003d\"color:var(--white-70);\"\u003e' + s.nom + '\u003c/span\u003e';\n html +\u003d ' \u003cspan style\u003d\"color:var(--gold);\"\u003e' + s.quantite + ' btl\u003c/span\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e';\n });\n div.innerHTML \u003d html;\n })\n .getSuccursalesDisponibles(codeSAQ);\n }\n );\n}\n\nfunction executeSearch() {\n const filters \u003d {\n classification: document.getElementById('search-classification').value,\n particularite: document.getElementById('search-particularite').value,\n producteur: document.getElementById('search-producteur').value,\n agent: document.getElementById('search-agent').value,\n aromes: document.getElementById('search-aromes').value,\n acidite: document.getElementById('search-acidite').value,\n sucrosite: document.getElementById('search-sucrosite').value,\n corps: document.getElementById('search-corps').value,\n bouche: document.getElementById('search-bouche').value,\n divers: document.getElementById('search-divers').value\n };\n\n const filtered \u003d ALL_DATA.filter(function(item) {\n return (!filters.classification || item.Classification \u003d\u003d\u003d filters.classification) \u0026\u0026\n (!filters.particularite || item['Particularité'] \u003d\u003d\u003d filters.particularite) \u0026\u0026\n (!filters.producteur || item.Producteur \u003d\u003d\u003d filters.producteur) \u0026\u0026\n (!filters.agent || item['Agent promo'] \u003d\u003d\u003d filters.agent) \u0026\u0026\n (!filters.aromes || item['Arômes'] \u003d\u003d\u003d filters.aromes) \u0026\u0026\n (!filters.acidite || item['Acidité'] \u003d\u003d\u003d filters.acidite) \u0026\u0026\n (!filters.sucrosite || item['Sucrosité'] \u003d\u003d\u003d filters.sucrosite) \u0026\u0026\n (!filters.corps || item.Corps \u003d\u003d\u003d filters.corps) \u0026\u0026\n (!filters.bouche || item.Bouche \u003d\u003d\u003d filters.bouche) \u0026\u0026\n (!filters.divers || item.Divers \u003d\u003d\u003d filters.divers);\n });\n\n RESULTATS_RECHERCHE_EN_ATTENTE \u003d filtered;\n changeView('liste');\n}\n\nfunction resetSearch() {\n document.getElementById('search-classification').value \u003d '';\n document.getElementById('search-particularite').value \u003d '';\n document.getElementById('search-producteur').value \u003d '';\n document.getElementById('search-agent').value \u003d '';\n document.getElementById('search-aromes').value \u003d '';\n document.getElementById('search-acidite').value \u003d '';\n document.getElementById('search-sucrosite').value \u003d '';\n document.getElementById('search-corps').value \u003d '';\n document.getElementById('search-bouche').value \u003d '';\n document.getElementById('search-divers').value \u003d '';\n}\n\n\n\n\n//
