}).forEach(function(e) {\n eSel.innerHTML +\u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"' + e + '\"\u003eESPACE - ' + e + '\u003c/option\u003e';\n });\n if (espace \u0026\u0026 espaces.has(espace)) eSel.value \u003d espace;\n }\n\n afficherEmplacements(ALL_DATA);\n}\n\n// Réinitialise les filtres de la vue emplacements\nfunction reinitialiserFiltresEmplacements() {\n document.getElementById('filter-meuble-emp').value \u003d \"\";\n document.getElementById('filter-rangee-emp').value \u003d \"\";\n document.getElementById('filter-espace-emp').value \u003d \"\";\n afficherEmplacements(ALL_DATA);\n}\n\n// Affiche la vue des emplacements dans les meubles\nfunction afficherEmplacements(data) {\n const div \u003d document.getElementById(\"emplacements-table\");\n if (!div) return;\n\n const meuble \u003d document.getElementById('filter-meuble-emp').value;\n const rangee \u003d document.getElementById('filter-rangee-emp').value;\n const espace \u003d document.getElementById('filter-espace-emp').value;\n\n div.innerHTML \u003d \"\";\n\n // --- BLOC VINS EN DOUBLE (sans filtre seulement) ---\n if (!meuble \u0026\u0026 !rangee \u0026\u0026 !espace) {\n const grouped \u003d {};\n data.forEach(function(item) {\n const statut \u003d item.Statut || \"En stock\";\n if (statut \u003d\u003d\u003d \"Bu\" || statut \u003d\u003d\u003d \"Sorti\") return;\n const cb \u003d (item[\"Code-barres\"] || \"\").toString().trim();\n if (!grouped[cb]) grouped[cb] \u003d { wine: item, count: 0, emplacements: [] };\n grouped[cb].count++;\n if (item.Meuble \u0026\u0026 item.Rangee \u0026\u0026 item.Espace) {\n grouped[cb].emplacements.push(item.Meuble.substring(0, 1).toUpperCase() + '-' + item.Rangee + '-' + item.Espace);\n } else {\n grouped[cb].emplacements.push('À ranger');\n }\n });\n\n const multiples \u003d Object.values(grouped).filter(function(g) { return g.count \u003e\u003d 2; });\n multiples.sort(function(a, b) { return b.count - a.count; });\n\n if (multiples.length \u003e 0) {\n let html \u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"bloc-niveau-1 mb-20\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv onclick\u003d\"basculerVinsMultiples()\" class\u003d\"collapsible-header\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cspan\u003e' + multiples.length + ' vin' + (multiples.length \u003e 1 ? 's' : '') + ' en double ou plus\u003c/span\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cspan id\u003d\"multiples-arrow\"\u003e▼\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/div\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv id\u003d\"vins-multiples-details\" class\u003d\"collapsible-content\" style\u003d\"display:none;\"\u003e';\n multiples.forEach(function(g) {\n const cb \u003d (g.wine[\"Code-barres\"] || \"\").toString().trim();\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"padding:10px 15px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);cursor:pointer;\" onclick\u003d\"ouvrirFicheVin(\\'' + cb + '\\')\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px;\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cspan class\u003d\"fs-13 fw-300\"\u003e' + g.wine.Nom + '\u003c/span\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cspan class\u003d\"color-muted fs-11\"\u003e' + g.count + ' bouteille' + (g.count \u003e 1 ? 's' : '') + '\u003c/span\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"fs-11 color-muted\"\u003e' + g.emplacements.join(' • ') + '\u003c/div\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e';\n });\n html +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/div\u003e';\n div.innerHTML +\u003d html;\n }\n }\n\n // --- FILTRES ---\n const filtered \u003d data.filter(function(item) {\n const statut \u003d item.Statut || \"En stock\";\n const isActive \u003d statut !\u003d\u003d \"Bu\" \u0026\u0026 statut !\u003d\u003d \"Sorti\";\n const hasLocation \u003d item.Meuble \u0026\u0026 item.Rangee \u0026\u0026 item.Espace;\n return isActive \u0026\u0026 hasLocation \u0026\u0026\n (!meuble || item.Meuble \u003d\u003d\u003d meuble) \u0026\u0026\n (!rangee || item.Rangee.toString() \u003d\u003d\u003d rangee) \u0026\u0026\n (!espace || item.Espace.toString() \u003d\u003d\u003d espace);\n });\n\n if (filtered.length \u003d\u003d\u003d 0 \u0026\u0026 !div.innerHTML) {\n div.innerHTML +\u003d \"\u003cp class\u003d'text-center p-15 color-muted'\u003eAucun emplacement trouvé\u003c/p\u003e\";\n return;\n }\n\n // --- BLOC CÉPAGES MANQUANTS AU CELLIER ---\n if (meuble \u003d\u003d\u003d 'Cellier' || meuble \u003d\u003d\u003d 'Pigeonnier') {\n const cepagesCellier \u003d new Set();\n const cepagesAutres \u003d {};\n\n data.forEach(function(item) {\n const statut \u003d item.Statut || \"En stock\";\n if (statut \u003d\u003d\u003d \"Bu\" || statut \u003d\u003d\u003d \"Sorti\" || !item.Meuble) return;\n const cepagesStr \u003d item.Cepage || '';\n if (!cepagesStr) return;\n const cepagesList \u003d cepagesStr.split(',').map(function(c) { return c.trim(); }).filter(Boolean);\n cepagesList.forEach(function(cepage) {\n if (item.Meuble \u003d\u003d\u003d meuble) {\n cepagesCellier.add(cepage);\n } else {\n if (!cepagesAutres[cepage]) cepagesAutres[cepage] \u003d [];\n cepagesAutres[cepage].push({ nom: item.Nom, codebarre: item[\"Code-barres\"] });\n }\n });\n });\n\n const manquants \u003d Object.keys(cepagesAutres).filter(function(c) { return !cepagesCellier.has(c); });\n\n if (manquants.length \u003e 0) {\n let html \u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"bloc-niveau-1 mb-20\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv onclick\u003d\"basculerCepagesManquants()\" class\u003d\"collapsible-header\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cspan\u003e' + manquants.length + ' cépage' + (manquants.length \u003e 1 ? 's' : '') + ' manquant' + (manquants.length \u003e 1 ? 's' : '') + ' au ' + meuble + '\u003c/span\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cspan id\u003d\"cepages-arrow\"\u003e▼\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/div\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv id\u003d\"cepages-manquants-details\" class\u003d\"collapsible-content\" style\u003d\"display:none;\"\u003e';\n manquants.sort().forEach(function(cepage) {\n const vins \u003d cepagesAutres[cepage];\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"padding:10px 15px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px;\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cspan class\u003d\"fs-13 fw-300\"\u003e' + cepage + '\u003c/span\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cspan class\u003d\"color-muted fs-11\"\u003e' + vins.length + ' bouteille' + (vins.length \u003e 1 ? 's' : '') + '\u003c/span\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e';\n vins.forEach(function(vin) {\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv onclick\u003d\"ouvrirFicheVin(\\'' + vin.codebarre + '\\')\" class\u003d\"fs-12 color-muted\" style\u003d\"padding:2px 0 2px 10px;cursor:pointer;\"\u003e• ' + vin.nom + '\u003c/div\u003e';\n });\n html +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e';\n });\n html +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/div\u003e';\n div.innerHTML +\u003d html;\n }\n\n // --- BLOC DOUBLONS CÉPAGES AU CELLIER ---\n const cepagesCellierGroupe \u003d {};\n filtered.forEach(function(item) {\n const cepagesStr \u003d item.Cepage || '';\n if (!cepagesStr) return;\n const cepageDominant \u003d cepagesStr.split(',')[0].trim();\n if (!cepagesCellierGroupe[cepageDominant]) cepagesCellierGroupe[cepageDominant] \u003d [];\n cepagesCellierGroupe[cepageDominant].push(item);\n });\n\n const doublons \u003d Object.entries(cepagesCellierGroupe).filter(function(entry) {\n return entry[1].length \u003e\u003d 2;\n }).sort(function(a, b) { return b[1].length - a[1].length; });\n\n if (doublons.length \u003e 0) {\n let html \u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"bloc-niveau-1 mb-20\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv onclick\u003d\"basculerDoublonsCepages()\" class\u003d\"collapsible-header\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cspan\u003e' + doublons.length + ' cépage' + (doublons.length \u003e 1 ? 's' : '') + ' en double au ' + meuble + '\u003c/span\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cspan id\u003d\"doublons-arrow\"\u003e▼\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/div\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv id\u003d\"doublons-cepages-details\" class\u003d\"collapsible-content\" style\u003d\"display:none;\"\u003e';\n doublons.forEach(function(entry) {\n const cepage \u003d entry[0];\n const vins \u003d entry[1];\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"padding:10px 15px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px;\"\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cspan class\u003d\"fs-13 fw-300\"\u003e' + cepage + '\u003c/span\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003cspan class\u003d\"color-muted fs-11\"\u003e' + vins.length + ' bouteilles\u003c/span\u003e';\n html +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e';\n vins.forEach(function(vin) {\n const cb \u003d (vin[\"Code-barres\"] || \"\").toString().trim();\n const emp \u003d vin.Meuble.substring(0, 1).toUpperCase() + '-' + vin.Rangee + '-' + vin.Espace;\n html +\u003d '\u003cdiv onclick\u003d\"ouvrirFicheVin(\\'' + cb + '\\')\" class\u003d\"fs-12 color-muted\" style\u003d\"padding:2px 0 2px 10px;cursor:pointer;\"\u003e• ' + vin.Nom + ' \u003cspan class\u003d\"color-muted\"\u003e(' + emp + ')\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/div\u003e';\n });\n html +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e';\n });\n html +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/div\u003e';\n div.innerHTML +\u003d html;\n }\n }\n\n // --- LISTE DES VINS AVEC EMPLACEMENT ---\n filtered.sort(function(a, b) {\n const ordreMeubles \u003d { \"Cellier\": 1, \"Réserve\": 2, \"Reserve\": 2, \"Caveau\": 3 };\n const valA \u003d ordreMeubles[a.Meuble] || 99;\n const valB \u003d ordreMeubles[b.Meuble] || 99;\n if (valA !\u003d\u003d valB) return valA - valB;\n if (parseInt(a.Rangee) !\u003d\u003d parseInt(b.Rangee)) return parseInt(a.Rangee) - parseInt(b.Rangee);\n return (parseInt(a.Espace) || 0) - (parseInt(b.Espace) || 0);\n });\n\n filtered.forEach(function(item) {\n const emp \u003d item.Meuble.substring(0, 1).toUpperCase() + '-' + item.Rangee + '-' + item.Espace;\n div.innerHTML +\u003d genererCardVin(item, { emplacements: [emp] });\n });\n}\n\n\n\n// Affiche ou cache la liste des cépages manquants au Cellier\nfunction basculerCepagesManquants() {\n const details \u003d document.getElementById('cepages-manquants-details');\n const arrow \u003d document.getElementById('cepages-arrow');\n if (details.style.display \u003d\u003d\u003d 'none') {\n details.style.display \u003d 'block';\n if (arrow) arrow.textContent \u003d '▲';\n } else {\n details.style.display \u003d 'none';\n if (arrow) arrow.textContent \u003d '▼';\n }\n}\n\nfunction basculerVinsMultiples() {\n const details \u003d document.getElementById('vins-multiples-details');\n const arrow \u003d document.getElementById('multiples-arrow');\n if (details.style.display \u003d\u003d\u003d 'none') {\n details.style.display \u003d 'block';\n if (arrow) arrow.textContent \u003d '▲';\n } else {\n details.style.display \u003d 'none';\n if (arrow) arrow.textContent \u003d '▼';\n }\n}\n\nfunction basculerDoublonsCepages() {\n const details \u003d document.getElementById('doublons-cepages-details');\n const arrow \u003d document.getElementById('doublons-arrow');\n if (details.style.display \u003d\u003d\u003d 'none') {\n details.style.display \u003d 'block';\n if (arrow) arrow.textContent \u003d '▲';\n } else {\n details.style.display \u003d 'none';\n if (arrow) arrow.textContent \u003d '▼';\n }\n}\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\nfunction lancerVerificationBatch() {\n const succursale \u003d document.getElementById('select-succursale').value;\n if (!succursale) { afficherMessage('Choisissez une succursale'); return; }\n\n const div \u003d document.getElementById('racheter-list');\n const status \u003d document.getElementById('dispo-status');\nconst cards \u003d div.querySelectorAll('.wine-card');\n const codesSAQ \u003d [];\n\n cards.forEach(function(card) {\n const codeSAQ \u003d card.getAttribute('data-codesaq');\n if (codeSAQ) codesSAQ.push(codeSAQ);\n });\n\n if (codesSAQ.length \u003d\u003d\u003d 0) { afficherMessage('Aucun vin avec code SAQ'); return; }\n\n status.style.display \u003d 'block';\n status.textContent \u003d 'Vérification en cours... (' + codesSAQ.length + ' vins) — cela peut prendre quelques minutes';\n\n google.script.run\n .withSuccessHandler(function(renderUrl) {\n fetch(renderUrl, {\n method: 'POST',\n headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n body: JSON.stringify({ codesProduits: codesSAQ, codeSuccursale: succursale })\n })\n .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })\n .then(function(data) {\n if (!data.success) { status.textContent \u003d 'Erreur: ' + data.message; return; }\n status.textContent \u003d 'Vérification terminée !';\n data.resultats.forEach(function(result) {\n const card \u003d div.querySelector('[data-codesaq\u003d\"' + result.codeProduit + '\"]');\n if (card) {\n const badge \u003d card.querySelector('.dispo-badge');\n if (badge) {\n badge.textContent \u003d result.disponible ? '✓' : '✗';\nbadge.style.fontSize \u003d '18px';\nbadge.style.fontWeight \u003d '300';\nbadge.style.color \u003d result.disponible ? '#4caf50' : '#f44336';\n }\n }\n });\n })\n .catch(function(err) {\n status.textContent \u003d 'Erreur de connexion: ' + err;\n });\n })\n .getRenderUrl();\n}\n\nfunction lancerVerificationGraphQL() {\n const succursale \u003d document.getElementById('select-succursale').value;\n if (!succursale) { afficherMessage('Choisissez une succursale'); return; }\n\n const div \u003d document.getElementById('racheter-list');\n const status \u003d document.getElementById('dispo-status');\n const cards \u003d div.querySelectorAll('.wine-card');\n\n status.style.display \u003d 'block';\n status.textContent \u003d 'Vérification en cours...';\n\n let total \u003d 0;\n let compteur \u003d 0;\n\n cards.forEach(function(card) {\n const codeSAQ \u003d card.getAttribute('data-codesaq');\n if (!codeSAQ) return;\n total++;\n\n google.script.run\n .withSuccessHandler(function(dispo) {\n const badge \u003d card.querySelector('.dispo-badge');\n if (badge) {\n badge.textContent \u003d dispo.disponible ? (dispo.quantite ? dispo.quantite + ' btl' : '✓') : '✗';\n badge.style.fontSize \u003d dispo.disponible ? '13px' : '18px';\n badge.style.fontWeight \u003d '300';\n badge.style.color \u003d dispo.disponible ? '#4caf50' : '#f44336';\n }\n compteur++;\n status.textContent \u003d 'Vérification... : ' + compteur + '/' + total;\n if (compteur \u003d\u003d\u003d total) status.textContent \u003d '✓ Vérification terminée !';\n })\n .withFailureHandler(function() { compteur++; })\n .verifierDispoSAQ_GRAPHQL_V1(codeSAQ, succursale);\n });\n\nif (total \u003d\u003d\u003d 0) { afficherMessage('Aucun vin avec code SAQ'); }\n}\n\n\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d FILTRES — COULEUR, CÉPAGE, PAYS, APPELLATION, ACCORDS \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n// Remplit les listes déroulantes des filtres selon les données disponibles\n\nfunction remplirFiltres(data) {\n const cSel \u003d document.getElementById(\"filter-couleur\");\n const cepSel \u003d document.getElementById(\"filter-cepage\");\n const pSel \u003d document.getElementById(\"filter-pays\");\n const appSel \u003d document.getElementById(\"filter-appellation\");\n const aSel \u003d document.getElementById(\"filter-accords\");\n if (!cSel) return;\n\n const currentCouleur \u003d cSel.value;\n const currentCepage \u003d cepSel.value;\n const currentPays \u003d pSel.value;\n const currentAppellation \u003d appSel.value;\n const currentAccords \u003d aSel.value;\n\n // Chaque filtre voit ses options depuis ALL_DATA\n // mais les autres filtres sont restreints aux données filtrées\n const forCouleur \u003d data;\n const forCepage \u003d currentCouleur ? data.filter(function(i) { return i.Couleur \u003d\u003d\u003d currentCouleur; }) : data;\n const forPays \u003d forCepage.filter(function(i) { return !currentCepage || (i.Cepage \u0026\u0026 i.Cepage.includes(currentCepage)); });\n const forAppellation \u003d forPays.filter(function(i) { return !currentPays || i.Pays \u003d\u003d\u003d currentPays; });\n const forAccords \u003d forAppellation.filter(function(i) { return !currentAppellation || i.Appellation \u003d\u003d\u003d currentAppellation; });\n\n const sets \u003d {\n c: new Set(),\n cep: new Set(),\n p: new Set(),\n app: new Set(),\n a: new Set()\n };\n\n forCouleur.forEach(function(i) { if (i.Couleur) sets.c.add(i.Couleur); });\n forCepage.forEach(function(i) { if (i.Cepage) i.Cepage.split(',').forEach(function(c) { sets.cep.add(c.trim()); }); });\n forPays.forEach(function(i) { if (i.Pays) sets.p.add(i.Pays); });\n forAppellation.forEach(function(i) { if (i.Appellation) sets.app.add(i.Appellation); });\n forAccords.forEach(function(i) { if (i.Accords) i.Accords.split(',').forEach(function(a) { sets.a.add(a.trim()); }); });\n\n const fill \u003d function(el, set, label, currentValue) {\n el.innerHTML \u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"\"\u003e' + label + '\u003c/option\u003e';\n Array.from(set).sort().forEach(function(v) {\n el.innerHTML +\u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"' + v + '\" ' + (v \u003d\u003d\u003d currentValue ? 'selected' : '') + '\u003e' + v.toUpperCase() + '\u003c/option\u003e';\n });\n };\n\n fill(cSel, sets.c, \"COULEURS\", currentCouleur);\n fill(cepSel, sets.cep, \"CÉPAGES\", currentCepage);\n fill(pSel, sets.p, \"PAYS\", currentPays);\n fill(appSel, sets.app, \"APPELLATIONS\", currentAppellation);\n fill(aSel, sets.a, \"ACCORDS\", currentAccords);\n}\n\n// Applique les filtres sélectionnés et rafraîchit la liste\nfunction appliquerFiltres() {\n const c \u003d document.getElementById(\"filter-couleur\").value;\n const cep \u003d document.getElementById(\"filter-cepage\").value;\n const p \u003d document.getElementById(\"filter-pays\").value;\n const app \u003d document.getElementById(\"filter-appellation\").value;\n const a \u003d document.getElementById(\"filter-accords\").value;\n\n const filtered \u003d ALL_DATA.filter(function(i) {\n return (!c || i.Couleur \u003d\u003d\u003d c) \u0026\u0026\n (!cep || (i.Cepage \u0026\u0026 i.Cepage.includes(cep))) \u0026\u0026\n (!p || i.Pays \u003d\u003d\u003d p) \u0026\u0026\n (!app || i.Appellation \u003d\u003d\u003d app) \u0026\u0026\n (!a || (i.Accords \u0026\u0026 i.Accords.includes(a)));\n });\n\n afficherCartes(filtered);\n remplirFiltres(ALL_DATA);\n}\n\n// Filtre la liste par nom de vin en temps réel\nfunction rechercherParNom() {\n const searchTerm \u003d document.getElementById('filter-nom').value.toLowerCase().trim();\n if (!searchTerm) { appliquerFiltres(); return; }\n const filtered \u003d ALL_DATA.filter(function(item) {\n return (item.Nom || '').toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm);\n });\n afficherCartes(filtered);\n}\n\n// Réinitialise tous les filtres\nfunction reinitialiserFiltres() {\n document.getElementById('filter-couleur').value \u003d '';\n document.getElementById('filter-cepage').value \u003d '';\n document.getElementById('filter-pays').value \u003d '';\n document.getElementById('filter-appellation').value \u003d '';\n document.getElementById('filter-accords').value \u003d '';\n document.getElementById('filter-nom').value \u003d '';\n afficherCartes(ALL_DATA);\n remplirFiltres(ALL_DATA);\n}\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d UTILITAIRES — FONCTIONS D'AIDE GÉNÉRALES \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n// Affiche un message temporaire au centre de l'écran\nfunction afficherMessage(m) {\n let t \u003d document.getElementById('toast') || document.createElement('div');\n t.id \u003d 'toast';\n t.className \u003d 'toast';\n document.body.appendChild(t);\n t.textContent \u003d m;\n t.classList.add('show');\n\n setTimeout(function() {\n t.classList.remove('show');\n setTimeout(function() { t.style.display \u003d 'none'; }, 400);\n }, 3000);\n}\n\n// Affiche une boîte de dialogue de confirmation personnalisée\nfunction afficherConfirmation(title, message, onConfirm, onCancel) {\n let overlay \u003d document.getElementById('confirmOverlay');\n if (!overlay) {\n overlay \u003d document.createElement('div');\n overlay.id \u003d 'confirmOverlay';\n overlay.className \u003d 'confirm-overlay';\n document.body.appendChild(overlay);\n }\n\n overlay.innerHTML \u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"confirm-dialog\"\u003e\u003cbutton onclick\u003d\"document.getElementById(\\'confirmOverlay\\').style.display\u003d\\'none\\'\" class\u003d\"confirm-dialog-close\"\u003e✕\u003c/button\u003e\u003ch3 class\u003d\"color-primary mb-20 fs-14 text-uppercase\"\u003e' + title + '\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp class\u003d\"color-white mb-20 fs-14\"\u003e' + message + '\u003c/p\u003e\u003cdiv class\u003d\"confirm-dialog-buttons\"\u003e\u003cbutton id\u003d\"confirmBtn\" class\u003d\"confirm-dialog-button confirm-dialog-button-primary\"\u003eOUI, SANTÉ !\u003c/button\u003e\u003cbutton id\u003d\"cancelBtn\" class\u003d\"confirm-dialog-button confirm-dialog-button-secondary\"\u003eANNULER\u003c/button\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/div\u003e';\n\n overlay.style.display \u003d 'flex';\n\n document.getElementById('confirmBtn').onclick \u003d function() {\n overlay.style.display \u003d 'none';\n if (onConfirm) onConfirm();\n };\n\n document.getElementById('cancelBtn').onclick \u003d function() {\n overlay.style.display \u003d 'none';\n if (onCancel) onCancel();\n };\n\n overlay.onclick \u003d function(e) {\n if (e.target \u003d\u003d\u003d overlay) {\n overlay.style.display \u003d 'none';\n if (onCancel) onCancel();\n }\n };\n}\n\n// Marque une bouteille comme bue avec confirmation\nfunction marquerBouteilleBue(row, bottle) {\n afficherConfirmation(\n 'Marquer comme bue',\n 'Confirmer que cette bouteille a été bue ?',\n function() {\n google.script.run\n .withSuccessHandler(function() {\n afficherMessage('Santé !');\n fermerFiche();\n chargerInventaire();\n })\n .withFailureHandler(function(err) {\n afficherMessage('Erreur: ' + err);\n })\n .actionBouteille(row, 'boire', { bottle: bottle });\n }\n );\n}\nfunction saveFiche() {\n const cb \u003d CURRENT_WINE_CODEBARRE;\n if (!cb) return;\n\n const aimeOui \u003d document.getElementById('edit-aime-oui');\n const aime \u003d aimeOui \u0026\u0026 aimeOui.getAttribute('data-selected') \u003d\u003d\u003d 'true' ? 'Oui' : 'Non';\n\n const updatedData \u003d {\n codebarre: cb,\n nom: document.getElementById('edit-nom').value,\n codesaq: document.getElementById('edit-codesaq').value,\n couleur: document.getElementById('edit-couleur').value,\n prix: document.getElementById('edit-prix').value,\n pays: document.getElementById('edit-pays').value,\n region: document.getElementById('edit-region').value,\n appellation: document.getElementById('edit-appellation').value,\n cepage: document.getElementById('edit-cepage').value,\n acidite: document.getElementById('edit-acidite').value,\n sucrosite: document.getElementById('edit-sucrosite').value,\n corps: document.getElementById('edit-corps').value,\n bouche: document.getElementById('edit-bouche').value,\n sucre: document.getElementById('edit-sucre').value,\n alcool: document.getElementById('edit-alcool').value,\n temperature: document.getElementById('edit-temperature').value,\n pastille: document.getElementById('edit-pastille').value,\n aromes: document.getElementById('edit-aromes').value,\n particularite: document.getElementById('edit-particularite').value,\n designation: document.getElementById('edit-designation').value,\n classification: document.getElementById('edit-classification').value,\n description: document.getElementById('edit-description').value,\n producteur: document.getElementById('edit-producteur').value,\n agent: document.getElementById('edit-agent').value,\n aime: aime,\n recettes: document.getElementById('edit-recettes').value,\n notestemp: document.getElementById('edit-notes-temp').value,\n divers: document.getElementById('edit-divers').value\n };\n\n google.script.run\n .withSuccessHandler(function() {\n afficherMessage('Modifications sauvegardées !');\n fermerEditFiche();\n ouvrirFicheVin(cb);\n })\n .withFailureHandler(function(err) {\n afficherMessage('Erreur: ' + err);\n })\n .saveWineEdits(updatedData);\n}\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d FONCTION UNIVERSELLE — CARTE DE VIN \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n// Cette fonction est LA SEULE qui génère une carte de vin.\n// Toutes les pages utilisent cette fonction.\n// Pour ajouter du contenu, utiliser les options — ne jamais créer une autre fonction.\n//\n// OPTIONS DISPONIBLES :\n// options.emplacements : tableau d'emplacements à afficher (droite)\n// options.count : nombre de bouteilles à afficher (droite)\n// options.badge : texte badge à droite (ex: disponibilité SAQ)\n// options.badgeVert : true \u003d badge en vert, false \u003d badge en rouge\n// options.mets : tableau de plats bus (historique)\n// options.clickable : false \u003d carte non cliquable (défaut: true)\n// options.avertissement : true \u003d carte avec ⚠️ sans code-barres\n\nfunction genererCardVin(item, options) {\n options \u003d options || {};\n\n const cb \u003d (item[\"Code-barres\"] || \"\").toString().trim().replace(/\\s+/g, '');\n const nom \u003d item.Nom || '— Vin sans nom —';\n const pays \u003d item.Pays || '';\n const region \u003d item.Region || '';\n const paysRegion \u003d pays \u0026\u0026 region ? pays + ' • ' + region : (pays || region);\n const cepage \u003d item.Cepage || '';\n\n // Couleur de bordure\n const couleur \u003d (item.Couleur || '').toLowerCase();\n const cClass \u003d couleur.includes('rouge') ? 'rouge' :\n couleur.includes('blanc') ? 'blanc' :\n couleur.includes('rose') || couleur.includes('rosé') ? 'rose' :\n couleur.includes('bulle') || couleur.includes('mousseux') ? 'bulles' : 'rouge';\n\n // Onclick\n const clickable \u003d options.clickable !\u003d\u003d false \u0026\u0026 cb;\n const onclick \u003d clickable ? 'onclick\u003d\"ouvrirFicheVin(\\'' + cb + '\\')\"' : '';\n\n // Colonne gauche\n let gauche \u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"wine-card-left\"\u003e';\n gauche +\u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"wine-name\"\u003e' + nom + (options.avertissement ? ' ⚠️' : '') + '\u003c/div\u003e';\n if (paysRegion) gauche +\u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"wine-sub\"\u003e' + paysRegion + '\u003c/div\u003e';\n if (cepage) gauche +\u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"wine-cepage\"\u003e' + cepage + '\u003c/div\u003e';\n\n // Plats bus (historique)\n if (options.mets \u0026\u0026 options.mets.length \u003e 0) {\n gauche +\u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"historique-mets\"\u003e';\n const accordColors \u003d { 1: '#FF4B2B', 2: '#FF9000', 3: '#FFD200', 4: '#8BC34A', 5: '#2ECC71' };\n options.mets.forEach(function(met) {\n const borderColor \u003d accordColors[met.note] || 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)';\n gauche +\u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"historique-met-item\" style\u003d\"border-left:3px solid ' + borderColor + ';\"\u003e';\n gauche +\u003d '\u003cspan\u003e' + (met.plat || '—') + '\u003c/span\u003e';\n gauche +\u003d '\u003cspan class\u003d\"historique-met-date\"\u003e' + met.date + '\u003c/span\u003e';\n gauche +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e';\n });\n gauche +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e';\n }\n\n gauche +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e';\n\n // Colonne droite\n let droite \u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"wine-card-right\"\u003e';\n\n if (options.avertissement) {\n droite +\u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"wine-count color-error\"\u003eSANS CODE-BARRES\u003c/div\u003e';\n } else {\n if (options.count !\u003d\u003d undefined) {\n droite +\u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"wine-count\"\u003e' + options.count + ' UNITÉ' + (options.count \u003e 1 ? 'S' : '') + '\u003c/div\u003e';\n }\n if (options.emplacements \u0026\u0026 options.emplacements.length \u003e 0) {\n options.emplacements.forEach(function(e) {\n if (e \u003d\u003d\u003d 'A ranger') {\n droite +\u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"wine-emplacement-ranger\"\u003eA ranger\u003c/div\u003e';\n } else {\n droite +\u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"wine-emplacement\"\u003e' + e + '\u003c/div\u003e';\n }\n });\n }\n if (options.badge !\u003d\u003d undefined) {\n const badgeClass \u003d options.badgeVert ? 'dispo-badge dispo-badge-oui' : 'dispo-badge dispo-badge-non';\n droite +\u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"' + badgeClass + '\"\u003e' + options.badge + '\u003c/div\u003e';\n }\n }\n\n droite +\u003d '\u003c/div\u003e';\n const avoirDroite \u003d options.count !\u003d\u003d undefined || (options.emplacements \u0026\u0026 options.emplacements.length \u003e 0) || options.badge !\u003d\u003d undefined || options.avertissement;\nconst opacityStyle \u003d (options.count \u003d\u003d\u003d 0) ? 'opacity:0.6;' : '';\nreturn '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"wine-card ' + cClass + '\" ' + onclick + ' data-codesaq\u003d\"' + (item['Code SAQ'] || '') + '\" style\u003d\"' + opacityStyle + '\"\u003e' + gauche + (avoirDroite ? droite : '') + '\u003c/div\u003e';\n}\n\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d LISTE PRINCIPALE \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\nfunction afficherCartes(data) {\n const div \u003d document.getElementById(\"inventory-cards\");\n if (!div) return;\n div.innerHTML \u003d \"\";\n\n const grouped \u003d {};\n data.forEach(function(item) {\n const cb \u003d (item[\"Code-barres\"] || \"\").toString().trim().replace(/\\s+/g, '');\n const key \u003d cb !\u003d\u003d \"\" ? cb : \"SANS_CB_\" + item.Nom + \"_\" + item.row;\n if (!grouped[key]) {\n grouped[key] \u003d { wine: item, count: 0, hasCodeBarre: cb !\u003d\u003d \"\", emplacements: [] };\n }\n const statut \u003d item.Statut || \"En stock\";\n if (statut !\u003d\u003d \"Bu\" \u0026\u0026 statut !\u003d\u003d \"Sorti\") {\n grouped[key].count++;\n const meuble \u003d item.Meuble \u0026\u0026 item.Meuble.toString().trim() !\u003d\u003d \"\" \u0026\u0026 item.Meuble.toString().trim() !\u003d\u003d \"undefined\" ? item.Meuble.toString().trim() : \"\";\n const rangee \u003d item.Rangee \u0026\u0026 item.Rangee.toString().trim() !\u003d\u003d \"\" \u0026\u0026 item.Rangee.toString().trim() !\u003d\u003d \"undefined\" ? item.Rangee.toString().trim() : \"\";\n const espace \u003d item.Espace \u0026\u0026 item.Espace.toString().trim() !\u003d\u003d \"\" \u0026\u0026 item.Espace.toString().trim() !\u003d\u003d \"undefined\" ? item.Espace.toString().trim() : \"\";\n const emplacement \u003d (meuble !\u003d\u003d \"\" \u0026\u0026 rangee !\u003d\u003d \"\" \u0026\u0026 espace !\u003d\u003d \"\") ?\n meuble.substring(0, 1).toUpperCase() + '-' + rangee + '-' + espace : 'A ranger';\n grouped[key].emplacements.push(emplacement);\n }\n });\n\n const sorted \u003d Object.values(grouped).sort(function(a, b) {\n const ordre \u003d { \"rouge\": 1, \"blanc\": 2, \"rose\": 3, \"bulles\": 4 };\n const valA \u003d ordre[(a.wine.Couleur || \"\").toLowerCase()] || 99;\n const valB \u003d ordre[(b.wine.Couleur || \"\").toLowerCase()] || 99;\n return valA !\u003d\u003d valB ? valA - valB : a.wine.Nom.localeCompare(b.wine.Nom);\n });\n\n if (sorted.length \u003d\u003d\u003d 0) {\n div.innerHTML \u003d \"\u003cp class\u003d'text-center p-15 color-muted'\u003eAucun vin en inventaire\u003c/p\u003e\";\n return;\n }\n\n sorted.forEach(function(group) {\n if (!group.hasCodeBarre) {\n div.innerHTML +\u003d genererCardVin(group.wine, { avertissement: true, clickable: false });\n } else {\n div.innerHTML +\u003d genererCardVin(group.wine, {\n count: group.count,\n emplacements: group.emplacements\n });\n }\n });\n}\n\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d LISTE À RANGER \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\nfunction afficherListeARanger(data) {\n const div \u003d document.getElementById(\"aranger-list\");\n if (!div) return;\n\n const aRanger \u003d data.filter(function(item) {\n const statut \u003d item.Statut || \"En stock\";\n return statut !\u003d\u003d \"Bu\" \u0026\u0026 statut !\u003d\u003d \"Sorti\" \u0026\u0026 (!item.Meuble || !item.Rangee || !item.Espace);\n });\n\n if (aRanger.length \u003d\u003d\u003d 0) {\n div.innerHTML \u003d \"\u003cp class\u003d'text-center p-15 color-muted'\u003eTout est bien rangé!\u003c/p\u003e\";\n return;\n }\n\n const grouped \u003d {};\n aRanger.forEach(function(item) {\n const cb \u003d (item[\"Code-barres\"] || \"\").toString().trim();\n if (!grouped[cb]) grouped[cb] \u003d { wine: item, count: 0 };\n grouped[cb].count++;\n });\n\n const sorted \u003d Object.values(grouped).sort(function(a, b) {\n const ordre \u003d { \"rouge\": 1, \"blanc\": 2, \"rose\": 3, \"bulles\": 4 };\n const valA \u003d ordre[(a.wine.Couleur || \"\").toLowerCase()] || 99;\n const valB \u003d ordre[(b.wine.Couleur || \"\").toLowerCase()] || 99;\n return valA !\u003d\u003d valB ? valA - valB : (a.wine.Nom || '').localeCompare(b.wine.Nom || '');\n });\n\n div.innerHTML \u003d \"\";\n sorted.forEach(function(group) {\n div.innerHTML +\u003d genererCardVin(group.wine, { count: group.count });\n });\n}\n\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d LISTE D'ACHAT \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\nfunction afficherListeRacheter(data) {\n const div \u003d document.getElementById(\"racheter-list\");\n if (!div) return;\n\n const grouped \u003d {};\n data.forEach(function(item) {\n const cb \u003d (item[\"Code-barres\"] || \"\").toString().trim();\n const statut \u003d item.Statut || \"En stock\";\n const isActive \u003d statut !\u003d\u003d \"Bu\" \u0026\u0026 statut !\u003d\u003d \"Sorti\";\n if (!grouped[cb]) grouped[cb] \u003d { wine: item, count: 0 };\n if (isActive) grouped[cb].count++;\n });\n\n const aRacheter \u003d Object.values(grouped).filter(function(g) {\n return (g.wine.Racheter \u003d\u003d\u003d \"Oui\" \u0026\u0026 g.count \u003d\u003d\u003d 0) || g.wine.Panier \u003d\u003d\u003d \"Oui\";\n });\n\n if (aRacheter.length \u003d\u003d\u003d 0) {\n div.innerHTML \u003d \"\u003cp class\u003d'text-center p-15 color-muted'\u003eAucun vin à racheter\u003c/p\u003e\";\n return;\n }\n\n const sorted \u003d aRacheter.sort(function(a, b) {\n const ordre \u003d { \"rouge\": 1, \"blanc\": 2, \"rose\": 3, \"bulles\": 4 };\n const valA \u003d ordre[(a.wine.Couleur || \"\").toLowerCase()] || 99;\n const valB \u003d ordre[(b.wine.Couleur || \"\").toLowerCase()] || 99;\n return valA !\u003d\u003d valB ? valA - valB : a.wine.Nom.localeCompare(b.wine.Nom);\n });\n\ndiv.innerHTML \u003d \"\";\n sorted.forEach(function(group) {\n const codeSAQ \u003d group.wine['Code SAQ'] || '';\n div.innerHTML +\u003d genererCardVin(group.wine, { badge: '...', count: group.count \u003e 0 ? group.count : undefined });\n });\n}\n\n\n// \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d HISTORIQUE \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\nfunction afficherHistorique(data) {\n const div \u003d document.getElementById(\"historique-list\");\n if (!div) return;\n\n if (!data || data.length \u003d\u003d\u003d 0) {\n div.innerHTML \u003d \"\u003cp class\u003d'text-center p-15 color-muted'\u003eAucun résultat\u003c/p\u003e\";\n return;\n }\n\n const grouped \u003d {};\n data.forEach(function(item) {\n const cb \u003d item.codebarre || '';\n if (!grouped[cb]) {\n grouped[cb] \u003d { nom: item.nom, couleur: item.couleur, codebarre: cb, mets: [] };\n }\n grouped[cb].mets.push({ plat: item.plat || '', date: item.date || '', note: parseInt(item.bonAccord) || 0 });\n });\n\n div.innerHTML \u003d \"\";\n Object.values(grouped).forEach(function(vin) {\n const fakeItem \u003d { Nom: vin.nom, Couleur: vin.couleur, 'Code-barres': vin.codebarre };\n div.innerHTML +\u003d genererCardVin(fakeItem, { mets: vin.mets });\n });\n}\nfunction chargerToutesSuccursales() {\n google.script.run\n .withSuccessHandler(function(succursales) {\n const select \u003d document.getElementById('select-toutes-succursales');\n if (!select) return;\n select.innerHTML \u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"\"\u003eChoisir une succursale...\u003c/option\u003e';\n succursales.forEach(function(s) {\n select.innerHTML +\u003d '\u003coption value\u003d\"' + s.numero + '\" data-nom\u003d\"' + s.ville + ' - ' + s.adresse + '\"\u003e' + s.ville + ' — ' + s.adresse + '\u003c/option\u003e';\n });\n })\n .getToutesSuccursales();\n}\n\nfunction remplirSuccursaleSelectionnee() {\n const select \u003d document.getElementById('select-toutes-succursales');\n const option \u003d select.options[select.selectedIndex];\n if (!option.value) return;\n document.getElementById('new-succursale-nom').value \u003d option.getAttribute('data-nom');\n document.getElementById('new-succursale-numero').value \u003d option.value;\n}\n\n\u003c/script\u003e",0,0],["Styles",2,"\u003cstyle\u003e\nhtml, body {\n overflow-x: hidden;\n width: 100%;\n position: relative;\n scrollbar-gutter: stable;\n}\n\n* {\n max-width: 100%;\n}\n\n.input-saisie-manuelle {\n flex: 1;\n height: 40px;\n padding: 0 15px;\n background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\n border: 1px solid rgba(201,129,60,0.4);\n color: #ffffff;\n font-size: 14px;\n box-sizing: border-box;\n -webkit-text-fill-color: #ffffff;\n width: calc(100% - 80px);\n}\n\n\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n VARIABLES \u0026 RESET\n Toutes les couleurs et valeurs réutilisables\n de l'application sont définies ici.\n Modifier une valeur ici l'applique partout.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n:root {\n --gold: #c9813c; /* Or principal — boutons, bordures, accents */\n --gold-2: #ffd036; /* Or vif — non utilisé actuellement */\n --gold-hover: #C98D4F; /* Or au survol */\n --black: #000;\n --white: #fff;\n --white-70: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); /* Texte secondaire */\n --white-60: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); /* Texte discret */\n --white-50: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); /* Texte très discret */\n --white-15: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); /* Bordures légères */\n --white-10: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); /* Fonds très transparents */\n --white-05: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); /* Fonds quasi-invisibles */\n --white-03: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); /* Fonds ultra-transparents */\n --bg-overlay: rgba(0,0,0,0.85); /* Fond des overlays (menus, popups) */\n --bg-card: rgba(0,0,0,0.50); /* Fond des cartes de vin */\n --bg-panel: rgba(20,20,20,0.95); /* Fond des panneaux (fiches, dialogues) */\n --bg-panel-light: rgba(20,20,20,0.70); /* Fond de panneau plus transparent */\n --red: #c0392b; /* Rouge — actions dangereuses */\n --green: #27ae60; /* Vert — confirmations */\n --orange: #e67e22; /* Orange — avertissements */\n --error: #f44336; /* Rouge erreur */\n --success: #4caf50; /* Vert succès */\n --info: #2196f3; /* Bleu info */\n --warning: #ffc107; /* Jaune avertissement */\n}\n\n* { \n margin: 0; \n padding: 0; \n box-sizing: border-box; \n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 1. FOND PHOTO \u0026 BASE\n Photo de fond fixe, légèrement assombrie.\n Le voile blur s'applique sur toutes les \n vues sauf l'accueil.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\nbody {\n position: relative;\n z-index: 0;\n margin: 0;\n font-family: 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;\n color: var(--white);\n background-color: var(--black);\n overflow-x: hidden;\n overflow-y: scroll;\n max-width: 100vw;\n}\n\n/* Photo de fond de base (nette, sans blur) */\nbody::after {\n content: \"\";\n position: fixed;\n top: 0; \n left: 0;\n width: 100%; \n height: 100%;\n background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)), \n url(\"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1738544475560-0683270451bd?q\u003d80\u0026w\u003d1470\u0026auto\u003dformat\u0026fit\u003dcrop\")\n center center / cover no-repeat;\n background-size: cover; \n background-position: center;\n /* Empêche l'image de recalculer sa taille au scroll */\n will-change: transform;\n transform: translateZ(0);\n -webkit-transform: translateZ(0);\n z-index: -2;\n}\n\n/* Voile blur pour toutes les sections SAUF l'accueil */\n.view-section::before {\n content: \"\";\n position: fixed;\n top: 0; \n left: 0;\n width: 100%; \n height: 100%;\n background: linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.2), rgba(0,0,0,0.2));\n backdrop-filter: blur(3px);\n -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(3px);\n z-index: -1;\n pointer-events: none;\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 2. HEADER \u0026 BURGER\n Barre de navigation en haut de l'écran.\n Le burger ouvre le menu latéral.\n Le bouton loupe ouvre le scanner.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n#topNav {\n position: relative;\n width: 100%;\n height: auto;\n padding-top: 20px;\n padding-bottom: 10px;\n z-index: 1000;\n background: transparent;\n text-align: center;\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: space-between;\n}\n\n.page-title-nav {\n display: none;\n}\n\n/* Bouton hamburger (☰) en haut à gauche */\n#burger {\n position: absolute;\n top: 5px; \n left: -5px;\n padding: 5px 25px;\n cursor: pointer;\n color: var(--white);\n z-index: 5001;\n transition: transform 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n#burger::before { \n content: \"☰\"; \n font-size: 40px; \n}\n\n#burger.open::before {\n content: \"✕\";\n color: var(--white);\n font-size: 40px;\n position: absolute;\n left: 0;\n}\n\n#burger.open { \n transform: rotate(90deg); \n z-index: 6000; \n}\n\n/* Bouton scanner (loupe) en haut à droite */\n#searchBtn {\n position: absolute;\n top: 10px;\n right: -5px;\n padding: 10px 25px;\n cursor: pointer;\n z-index: 5001;\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n}\n\n#searchBtn img {\n width: 42px;\n height: 42px;\n filter: brightness(0) invert(1);\n opacity: 0.99;\n transition: opacity 0.2s;\n}\n\n#searchBtn:hover img {\n opacity: 1;\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 3. MENU LATÉRAL\n Glisse depuis la gauche quand ouvert.\n Contient les liens de navigation principale.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n.side-menu {\n position: fixed;\n top: 0; \n left: -280px;\n width: 280px; \n height: 100%;\n background: var(--bg-overlay);\n backdrop-filter: blur(8px);\n z-index: 2000;\n transition: left 0.3s ease-out;\n padding-top: 60px;\n}\n\n.side-menu.open { \n left: 0; \n box-shadow: 4px 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); \n}\n\n.side-menu a {\n display: block;\n padding: 15px 25px;\n color: var(--white);\n text-decoration: none;\n transition: color 0.2s;\n}\n\n.side-menu a:hover,\n.side-menu a:active {\n color: var(--gold);\n}\n\n/* Bouton X de fermeture du menu */\n.side-menu .confirm-dialog-close {\n position: absolute;\n top: 0;\n left: -5px;\n padding: 10px 25px;\n background: none;\n border: none;\n color: var(--white);\n font-size: 35px;\n cursor: pointer;\n width: auto;\n height: auto;\n font-weight: 300;\n transition: color 0.2s;\n}\n\n.side-menu .confirm-dialog-close:hover {\n color: var(--gold);\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 4. WRAPPER \u0026 VUES\n Conteneur principal centré.\n Chaque vue est cachée sauf celle active.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n#mainWrapper {\n max-width: 700px;\n width: 100%;\n margin: 0 auto 20px auto;\n padding: 5px 10px;\n padding-top: 45px;\n color: var(--white);\n position: relative;\n z-index: 1;\n}\n\n.view-section { \n display: none; \n}\n\n.view-section.active { \n display: block; \n}\n\n.inutile-view-section-padding { \n padding: 40px 20px; \n text-align: center; \n}\n\n.inutile-view-section-inner { \n max-width: 700px; \n margin: 0 auto; \n}\n\n.inutile-view-section-actions { \n margin-top: 80px; /* Espace sous le titre DIONYSOS à l'accueil */\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 5. TITRES UNIFIÉS\n Deux styles de titres :\n - Grand titre pour l'accueil (DIONYSOS)\n - Petit titre pour les pages secondaires\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n\n/* Grand titre de la page d'accueil */\n#view-accueil .page-title,\n#view-titre .page-title {\n font-family: \"Montserrat\", sans-serif;\n font-size: clamp(36px, 8vw, 45px);\n letter-spacing: 3px;\n color: var(--gold);\n font-weight: 700;\n text-align: center;\n margin-bottom: 0;\n background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.75);\n padding: 20px 30px 10px 30px;\n display: block;\n width: 100%;\n}\n\n/* Sous-titre de l'accueil (CAVE À VIN) */\n#view-accueil .subtitle,\n#view-titre .subtitle {\n font-family: \"Montserrat\", sans-serif;\n font-size: clamp(18px, 4vw, 23px);\n color: var(--white);\n letter-spacing: 9px;\n text-align: center;\n background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.75);\n padding: 0 30px 20px 30px;\n display: block;\n width: 100%;\n margin-top: 0;\n}\n\n#view-titre {\n width: 100%;\n max-width: 700px;\n margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n/* Titre des pages secondaires (CAVE À VIN, HISTORIQUE, etc.) */\n.page-title {\n font-size: clamp(18px, 4vw, 20px);\n font-weight: 400;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n letter-spacing: 2px;\n color: var(--white);\n text-align: center;\n margin: 0;\n}\n\n/* En-tête de chaque page avec titre + ligne dorée */\n.page-header {\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: center;\n padding-bottom: 15px;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gold);\n margin-bottom: 20px;\n}\n\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 5b. NIVEAUX DE BLOCS\n Système de conteneurs réutilisables\n dans toute l'application.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n\n/* Niveau 1 — Bloc conteneur principal (fond noir transparent, sans bordure) */\n.bloc-niveau-1 {\n background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7);\n padding: 12px 25px\n margin-bottom: 15px;\n}\n\n/* Niveau 2 — Élément dans un bloc (fine bordure dorée) */\n.bloc-niveau-2 {\n border: 1px solid rgba(201,129,60,0.3);\n padding: 18px 20px;\n margin-bottom: 10px;\n font-size: 16px;\n font-weight: 300;\n letter-spacing: 2px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--white);\n background: rgba(0,0,0,0.70);\n}\n\n/* Niveau 3 — Sous-élément (bordure dorée très subtile) */\n.inutile-bloc-niveau-3 {\n border: 1px solid rgba(201,129,60,0.2);\n padding: 12px 16px;\n font-size: 14px;\n font-weight: 300;\n letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n color: var(--white-70);\n}\n\n/* Niveau 4 — Élément dans un bloc */\n.inutile-bloc-niveau-4 {\n padding: 8px 10px;\n font-size: 13px;\n font-weight: 300;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--white);\n}\n\n\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 6. FILTRES UNIFIÉS\n Barre de filtres commune à plusieurs vues.\n Les selects sont transparents sur fond noir.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n\n/* Conteneur principal des filtres */\n.filter-container {\n background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);\n margin-bottom: 20px;\n}\n\n/* Rangée de filtres (selects côte à côte) */\n.filter-row {\n display: flex;\n}\n\n\n/* Chaque liste déroulante dans les filtres */\n.filter-select {\n flex: 1;\n height: 45px;\n border: none;\n padding: 0 2px;\n font-weight: 300;\n color: var(--white-70);\n font-size: 11px;\n background: transparent;\n text-align: center;\n text-align-last: center;\n -webkit-appearance: none;\n appearance: none;\n outline: none;\n cursor: pointer;\n scrollbar-width: none;\n -ms-overflow-style: none;\n overflow: hidden;\n text-overflow: ellipsis;\n white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n\n.filter-select-gros {\n flex: 1;\n height: 45px;\n border: none;\n padding: 0 2px;\n font-weight: 300;\n color: var(--white-70);\n font-size: 14px;\n background: transparent;\n text-align: center;\n text-align-last: center;\n -webkit-appearance: none;\n appearance: none;\n outline: none;\n cursor: pointer;\n scrollbar-width: none;\n -ms-overflow-style: none;\n overflow: hidden;\n text-overflow: ellipsis;\n white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n.filter-select:last-child {\n \n}\n\n.filter-select option {\n font-size: 11px;\n background: #1a1a1a;\n color: #fff;\n }\n\n.filter-select::-webkit-scrollbar {\n display: none;\n}\n\n\n\n/* Champ de recherche par nom */\n.filter-input {\n flex: 1;\n height: 45px;\n border: none;\n padding: 0 15px;\n font-size: 16px;\n background: transparent;\n color: var(--white);\n outline: none;\n}\n\n\n#manual-barcode-input {\n flex: 1;\n height: 40px;\n padding: 0 15px;\n background: #1a1a1a;\n border: 1px solid rgba(201,129,60,0.4);\n color: #ffffff !important;\n font-size: 14px;\n box-sizing: border-box;\n -webkit-text-fill-color: #ffffff !important;\n opacity: 1 !important;\n min-width: 0;\n}\n\n.filter-input::placeholder {\n color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);\n}\n\n/* Ligne de séparation dorée entre les rangées de filtres */\n.filter-separator {\n height: 1px;\n background: rgba(201,129,60,0.3);\n}\n\n\n/* Bouton reset (X) à droite des filtres */\n.filter-reset {\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n min-width: 40px;\n background: transparent;\n color: var(--white-50);\n font-weight: 300;\n font-size: 16px;\n cursor: pointer;\n border-left: 1px solid rgba(201,129,60,0.3);\n transition: color 0.2s;\n}\n\n.filter-reset:hover {\n color: var(--gold);\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 7. CARTES DE VIN\n Cartes utilisées dans la liste principale,\n la liste d'achat, à ranger, emplacements.\n La couleur de bordure change selon le type.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n CARTES DE VIN — MISE EN PAGE RIGIDE\n Colonne droite toujours alignée en haut\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n\n.wine-card {\n position: relative;\n background: var(--bg-card);\n padding: 12px 15px;\n margin-bottom: 10px;\n border-left: 4px solid var(--gold);\n backdrop-filter: blur(5px);\n -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(5px);\n cursor: pointer;\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: flex-start;\n min-height: 60px;\n gap: 15px;\n}\n\n/* Couleurs de bordure selon le type de vin */\n.wine-card.rouge { border-left: 2px solid #8B0000; }\n.wine-card.blanc { border-left: 2px solid #f7f6da; }\n.wine-card.rose { border-left: 2px solid #FFC0CB; }\n.wine-card.bulles { border-left: 2px solid #00ced1; }\n/* Colonne gauche — flexible */\n.wine-card-left {\n flex: 1;\n display: flex;\n flex-direction: column;\n gap: 4px;\n min-width: 0;\n align-items: flex-start;\n width: 100%;\n}\n\n/* Colonne droite — rigide, toujours alignée en haut */\n.wine-card-right {\n display: flex;\n flex-direction: column;\n align-items: flex-end;\n justify-content: flex-start;\n gap: 4px;\n flex-shrink: 0;\n min-width: 70px;\n}\n\n/* Nom du vin */\n.wine-name {\n font-weight: 600;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n font-size: 14px;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n}\n\n/* Pays et région */\n.wine-sub {\n color: var(--white-60);\n font-size: 11px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n font-weight: 400;\n}\n\n/* Cépage — légèrement plus discret */\n.wine-cepage {\n color: var(--white-50);\n font-size: 11px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n font-weight: 300;\n letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n}\n\n/* Compteur de bouteilles — toujours en haut à droite */\n.wine-count {\n font-size: 11px;\n color: var(--gold);\n font-weight: 600;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n/* Emplacement — sous le compteur */\n.wine-emplacement {\n font-size: 11px;\n color: var(--white-60);\n text-align: right;\n white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n/* \"A ranger\" en orange */\n.wine-emplacement-ranger {\n font-size: 11px;\n color: var(--warning);\n text-align: right;\n white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 8. FORMULAIRES UNIFIÉS\n Styles communs pour tous les champs\n de saisie dans l'application.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n.field-container { \n margin-bottom: 20px; \n}\n\nlabel {\n font-size: 11px;\n font-weight: 400;\n display: block;\n margin-bottom: 8px;\n color: var(--white-70);\n text-transform: uppercase;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n}\n\ninput, select, textarea {\n width: 100%;\n height: 50px;\n border: 1px solid var(--white-15);\n padding: 0 15px;\n font-size: 16px;\n background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);\n backdrop-filter: blur(4px);\n color: var(--white);\n transition: border 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease;\n}\n\ntextarea {\n height: auto;\n min-height: 80px;\n padding: 12px 15px;\n resize: vertical;\n}\n\ninput:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus {\n outline: none;\n background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.7);\n color: var(--white);\n border-color: var(--gold);\n}\n\n.filter-select:focus {\n border-color: transparent;\n}\n\nselect option {\n background-color: #1e1e1e;\n color: var(--white);\n padding: 10px;\n}\n\n/* Séparateur de section dans les formulaires */\n.form-divider {\n margin: 30px 0 20px;\n font-size: 18px;\n font-weight: 400;\n color: var(--white-70);\n border-bottom: 2px solid var(--gold);\n padding-bottom: 8px;\n text-align: center;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 9. MULTI-SELECT\n Liste déroulante avec cases à cocher.\n Utilisée pour les accords dans la fiche vin.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n.multi-select-container {\n position: relative;\n background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);\n border: 1px solid var(--white-15);\n cursor: pointer;\n height: 50px;\n}\n\n.multi-select-header {\n padding: 15px;\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: center;\n color: var(--white);\n font-size: 14px;\n height: 100%;\n}\n\n.multi-select-list {\n display: none;\n position: absolute;\n top: 100%; \n left: 0;\n width: 100%;\n max-height: 200px;\n overflow-y: auto;\n background: #1e1e1e;\n border: 1px solid var(--gold);\n z-index: 1000;\n -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;\n scrollbar-width: none;\n -ms-overflow-style: none;\n}\n\n.multi-select-list::-webkit-scrollbar { \n display: none; \n}\n\n.checkbox-item {\n padding: 8px 12px;\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--white-05);\n}\n\n.checkbox-item input[type\u003d\"checkbox\"] {\n width: 18px; \n height: 18px;\n margin-right: 10px;\n accent-color: var(--gold);\n}\n\n.checkbox-item label {\n cursor: pointer;\n flex: 1;\n margin: 0;\n color: var(--white);\n font-size: 13px;\n text-transform: none;\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 10. BOUTONS UNIFIÉS\n Quatre types principaux de boutons.\n Variantes de couleur disponibles.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n\nbutton {\n font-family: 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;\n}\n\n/* Bouton principal — actions importantes (Enregistrer, Confirmer) */\n.btn-primary {\n width: 100%;\n height: 50px;\n background: var(--gold);\n color: var(--black);\n border: none;\n font-weight: 400;\n letter-spacing: 2px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n cursor: pointer;\n font-size: 18px;\n transition: background 0.2s ease;\n}\n\n.btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) {\n background: var(--gold-hover);\n}\n\n.btn-primary:disabled {\n opacity: 0.4;\n cursor: not-allowed;\n}\n\n/* Bouton secondaire — actions neutres (Annuler) */\n.btn-secondary {\n width: 100%;\n height: 50px;\n background: var(--white-10);\n color: var(--white);\n border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);\n font-weight: 400;\n letter-spacing: 2px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n cursor: pointer;\n font-size: 14px;\n transition: background 0.2s ease;\n}\n\n.btn-secondary:hover {\n background: var(--white-15);\n}\n\n/* Bouton scanner */\n.btn-scan {\n height: 50px;\n padding: 0 20px;\n background: var(--gold);\n color: var(--black);\n border: none;\n font-weight: 400;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n cursor: pointer;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n font-size: 14px;\n white-space: nowrap;\n transition: background 0.2s ease;\n}\n\n.btn-scan:hover {\n background: var(--gold-hover);\n}\n\n/* Bouton fermer (X) — fond transparent */\n.btn-close-form {\n background: none;\n border: none;\n outline: none;\n color: var(--white);\n width: 40px;\n height: 40px;\n font-size: 24px;\n cursor: pointer;\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n transition: color 0.2s ease;\n font-weight: 700;\n padding: 0;\n flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.btn-close-form:hover {\n color: var(--error);\n}\n\n/* Bouton compact — version réduite du bouton primaire */\n.btn-compact {\n padding: 8px 16px;\n font-size: 12px;\n height: 40px;\n width: auto;\n}\n\n/* Variantes de couleur pour les boutons */\n.btn-bg-green {\n background: var(--green) !important;\n color: var(--white) !important;\n}\n\n.btn-bg-green:hover {\n background: #2ecc71 !important;\n}\n\n.btn-bg-red {\n background: var(--red) !important;\n color: var(--white) !important;\n}\n\n.btn-bg-red:hover {\n background: #e74c3c !important;\n}\n\n.btn-bg-orange {\n background: var(--orange) !important;\n color: var(--white) !important;\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 11. FICHE VIN\n Overlay qui s'ouvre par-dessus le contenu.\n Contient toutes les informations d'un vin\n et la gestion de ses bouteilles.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n\n/* Fond semi-transparent de l'overlay */\n.fichevin-overlay {\n display: none;\n position: fixed;\n top: 0;\n left: 0;\n width: 100%;\n height: 100%;\n background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03);\n backdrop-filter: blur(1px);\n -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(5px);\n z-index: 10000;\n overflow-y: auto;\n padding: 0 ;\n opacity: 0;\n transition: opacity 0.35s ease;\n}\n\n.fichevin-overlay.active {\n opacity: 1;\n}\n\n/* Fenêtre principale de la fiche vin */\n.fichevin-window {\n width: 100%;\n max-width: 680px;\n background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95);\n backdrop-filter: blur(10px);\n -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);\n padding: 0;\n border: none;\n border-left: 2px solid var(--gold);\n color: var(--white);\n box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);\n margin: 60px auto 40px;\n transform: translateY(20px);\n opacity: 0;\n transition: transform 0.35s ease, opacity 0.35s ease;\n}\n\n.fichevin-window.active {\n transform: translateY(0);\n opacity: 1;\n}\n\n/* Couleurs de bordure selon le type de vin */\n.fichevin-window.rouge { border-left-color: #8B0000; }\n.fichevin-window.blanc { border-left-color: #f7f6da; }\n.fichevin-window.rose { border-left-color: #FFC0CB; }\n.fichevin-window.bulles { border-left-color: #00ced1; }\n\n/* En-tête de la fiche : nom + bouton SAQ + fermer */\n.fichevin-header {\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: stretch;\n padding: 25px 30px 20px;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--white-70);\n}\n\n.fv-title {\n color: var(--white);\n font-size: clamp(16px, 4vw, 20px);\n font-weight: 600;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n margin: 0;\n}\n\n/* Nom du vin cliquable (ouvre la page SAQ) */\n.fv-title-link {\n color: var(--white);\n text-decoration: none;\n cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.fv-title-link:hover {\n color: var(--gold-hover);\n}\n\n.fv-origine {\n margin-top: 12px;\n}\n\n.fiche-origine-texts {\n font-size: 13px;\n color: var(--white);\n line-height: 1.6;\n}\n\n.fiche-origine-texts div {\n margin-bottom: 3px;\n}\n\n/* Bouton SAQ doré (carré) */\n.btn-saq {\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n width: 50px;\n height: 50px;\n background: var(--gold);\n color: var(--black);\n text-decoration: none;\n font-weight: 700;\n font-size: 11px;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n flex-shrink: 0;\n transition: background 0.2s;\n}\n\n.btn-saq:hover {\n background: var(--gold-hover);\n}\n\n/* Groupe de boutons dans l'en-tête (SAQ + fermer) */\n.fiche-header-actions {\n display: flex;\n flex-direction: column;\n align-items: flex-end;\n justify-content: space-between;\n flex-shrink: 0;\n margin-left: 15px;\n}\n\n/* Boutons icônes (crayon édition, etc.) */\n.fiche-icon-btn {\n background: none;\n border: none;\n color: var(--white);\n font-size: 20px;\n cursor: pointer;\n padding: 5px;\n transition: color 0.2s;\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n width: 35px;\n height: 35px;\n}\n\n.fiche-icon-btn:hover {\n color: var(--gold);\n}\n\n.fiche-icon-btn.save {\n color: var(--gold);\n}\n\n/* Contenu principal de la fiche */\n#fiche-content {\n padding: 20px 30px 30px;\n color: var(--white);\n}\n\n/* Sections à l'intérieur de la fiche (Dégustation, Notes, Inventaire, Production) */\n.fiche-section {\n margin-bottom: 30px;\n padding-bottom: 20px;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--white-70);\n}\n\n.fiche-section:last-child {\n border-bottom: none;\n margin-bottom: 0;\n}\n\n/* Titre de chaque section (DÉGUSTATION, NOTES, etc.) */\n.fiche-section-title {\n color: var(--gold-hover);\n font-size: 13px;\n font-weight: 600;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n letter-spacing: 1.5px;\n margin: 0 0 15px 0;\n}\n\n/* Champ d'information dans la fiche */\n.fiche-field {\n font-size: 13px;\n line-height: 1.6;\n margin-bottom: 10px;\n}\n\n/* Étiquette d'un champ (ex: \"Cépages :\") */\n.fiche-label {\n color: var(--white-70);\n font-weight: 500;\n font-size: 11px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n}\n\n/* Arômes en italique */\n.fiche-aromes {\n font-style: italic;\n color: var(--white-70);\n margin-bottom: 15px;\n font-size: 13px;\n line-height: 1.5;\n}\n\n\n/* Grille des caractéristiques (acidité, corps, etc.) */\n.fiche-table {\n display: flex;\n flex-wrap: wrap;\n gap: 6px;\n margin: 15px 0;\n}\n\n.fiche-table-cell {\n padding: 6px 10px;\n background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);\n border: 1px solid var(--white-10);\n text-align: center;\n flex: 0 0 auto;\n}\n\n.fiche-table-label {\n font-size: 10px;\n color: var(--white-60);\n text-transform: uppercase;\n margin-bottom: 5px;\n letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n}\n\n.fiche-table-value {\n font-weight: 600;\n font-size: 13px;\n color: var(--white);\n}\n\n/* Section inventaire avec fond doré subtil */\n.fiche-section-inventaire {\n background: rgba(217, 122, 0, 0.05);\n padding: 20px 0;\n margin: 0;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--white-70);\n margin-bottom: 30px;\n}\n\n/* Bouton pour ajouter une bouteille */\n.btn-add-bottle {\n width: 100%;\n margin-top: 15px;\n background: var(--gold);\n color: var(--black);\n border: none;\n padding: 12px 15px;\n font-size: 12px;\n font-weight: 600;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n cursor: pointer;\n transition: background 0.2s;\n}\n\n.btn-add-bottle:hover {\n background: var(--gold-hover);\n}\n\n/* Carte d'une bouteille individuelle */\n.bottle-card {\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: center;\n background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);\n padding: 15px;\n border: 1px solid var(--gold);\n margin-bottom: 10px;\n gap: 15px;\n box-sizing: border-box;\n width: 100%;\n}\n\n.bottle-card:last-of-type {\n margin-bottom: 0;\n}\n\n/* Emplacement de la bouteille (Meuble-Rangée-Espace) */\n.bottle-card-location {\n flex: 1;\n font-size: 13px;\n line-height: 1.5;\n}\n\n/* Numéro de bouteille en doré */\n.bottle-number {\n color: var(--gold-hover);\n font-weight: 600;\n font-size: 13px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n\n/* Texte \"À ranger\" en orange */\n.bottle-to-arrange {\n color: var(--warning);\n font-weight: 500;\n}\n\n/* Texte \"Bue\" discret */\n.bottle-status-bu {\n color: var(--white-50);\n font-size: 12px;\n font-style: italic;\n padding: 8px 15px;\n}\n\n.bottle-card-actions {\n display: flex;\n gap: 8px;\n flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n/* Boutons d'action sur les bouteilles (Déplacer, Boire) */\n.btn-bottle-action {\n border: none;\n cursor: pointer;\n font-size: 12px;\n font-weight: 600;\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n gap: 5px;\n padding: 8px 12px;\n transition: transform 0.2s, opacity 0.2s;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n.btn-bottle-move {\n background: var(--gold);\n color: var(--white);\n}\n\n.btn-bottle-move:hover {\n background: #a00;\n}\n\n.btn-bottle-drink {\n background: var(--gold);\n color: var(--white);\n}\n\n.btn-bottle-drink:hover {\n background: #a00;\n}\n\n/* Message quand aucune bouteille */\n.fiche-empty {\n color: var(--white-50);\n font-style: italic;\n font-size: 13px;\n text-align: center;\n padding: 20px;\n}\n\n/* Responsive mobile pour la fiche vin */\n@media (max-width: 600px) {\n .fichevin-overlay {\n padding: 10px 5px;\n }\n\n .fichevin-window {\n margin: 40px auto 20px;\n }\n\n .fichevin-header {\n padding: 20px 15px 15px;\n }\n\n #fiche-content {\n padding: 15px;\n }\n\n .btn-saq {\n width: 45px;\n height: 45px;\n }\n\n .fiche-table {\n grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(70px, 1fr));\n gap: 5px;\n }\n\n .fiche-table-cell {\n padding: 8px 5px;\n }\n\n .fiche-table-label {\n font-size: 9px;\n }\n\n .fiche-table-value {\n font-size: 12px;\n }\n\n .fiche-section-inventaire {\n margin: 20px 0 0;\n padding: 15px 0;\n }\n\n .bottle-card {\n flex-direction: column;\n align-items: flex-start;\n gap: 10px;\n}\n\n.bottle-card-actions {\n width: 100%;\n justify-content: space-between;\n}\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 12. BOUTEILLES (section dupliquée)\n NOTE: Ces styles sont en partie redondants\n avec la section 11. À nettoyer éventuellement.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n.bottles-list {\n display: flex;\n flex-direction: column;\n gap: 10px;\n}\n\n\n\n/* Boutons dans les cartes de bouteilles */\n.bottle-card-actions .btn-compact {\n background: var(--gold);\n color: var(--black);\n}\n\n.bottle-card-actions .btn-compact:hover {\n background: var(--gold-hover);\n}\n\n/* Bouton danger (rouge) dans les cartes de bouteilles */\n.bottle-card-actions .btn-danger {\n background: var(--red);\n color: var(--white);\n}\n\n.bottle-card-actions .btn-danger:hover {\n background: #e74c3c;\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 13. TABLES\n Utilisée dans la vue Emplacements.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n.data-table {\n width: 100%;\n border-collapse: collapse;\n background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3);\n table-layout: fixed;\n}\n\n.data-table thead tr {\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gold);\n text-align: left;\n}\n\n.data-table th {\n padding: 12px 8px;\n font-size: clamp(9px, 2vw, 11px);\n color: var(--white);\n text-transform: uppercase;\n font-weight: 700;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n}\n\n.data-table td {\n padding: 12px 8px;\n font-size: clamp(11px, 2.5vw, 13px);\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--white-10);\n overflow: hidden;\n text-overflow: ellipsis;\n}\n\n/* Largeurs des colonnes pour la table Emplacements */\n#emplacements-table .data-table th:nth-child(1),\n#emplacements-table .data-table td:nth-child(1) { width: 80px; }\n\n#emplacements-table .data-table th:nth-child(2),\n#emplacements-table .data-table td:nth-child(2) { width: 40px; text-align: center; }\n\n#emplacements-table .data-table th:nth-child(3),\n#emplacements-table .data-table td:nth-child(3) { width: 40px; text-align: center; }\n\n#emplacements-table .data-table th:nth-child(4),\n#emplacements-table .data-table td:nth-child(4) { width: auto; }\n\n#emplacements-table .data-table th:nth-child(5),\n#emplacements-table .data-table td:nth-child(5) { width: 150px; }\n\n.data-table tbody tr {\n cursor: pointer;\n transition: background 0.2s;\n}\n\n.data-table tbody tr:hover {\n background: rgba(230,161,0,0.1);\n}\n\n/* Couleurs de fond selon le type de vin dans les tables */\n.data-table-row-rouge { background: rgba(139,0,0,0.15); }\n.data-table-row-blanc { background: rgba(240,230,140,0.08); }\n.data-table-row-rose { background: rgba(255,192,203,0.08); }\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 14. BOÎTES D'ALERTE\n Utilisées pour les avertissements\n (ex: cépages manquants au Cellier)\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n.alert-box {\n background: rgba(230,161,0,0.15);\n border-left: 2px solid var(--gold);\n padding: 15px;\n margin-bottom: 20px;\n}\n\n.alert-box strong {\n color: var(--gold);\n font-size: 14px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n\n.alert-content {\n margin-top: 10px;\n font-size: 13px;\n line-height: 1.8;\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 15. OVERLAYS DE CONFIRMATION\n Boîtes de dialogue (Confirmer, Annuler).\n Utilisées pour les actions importantes.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n.confirm-overlay {\n display: none;\n position: fixed;\n top: 0; \n left: 0;\n width: 100%; \n height: 100%;\n background: var(--bg-overlay);\n backdrop-filter: blur(6px);\n z-index: 12000;\n align-items: flex-start;\n justify-content: center;\n padding-top: 100px;\n padding: 20px;\n}\n\n.confirm-dialog {\n background: var(--bg-panel);\n backdrop-filter: blur(6px);\n padding: 25px;\n max-width: 400px;\n width: 100%;\n border: 2px solid var(--gold);\n box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);\n text-align: center;\n position: relative;\n margin-top: 100px;\n}\n\n.confirm-dialog h3 {\n color: var(--gold);\n margin: 0 0 15px 0;\n font-size: 18px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n}\n\n.confirm-dialog p {\n color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);\n margin: 0 0 25px 0;\n font-size: 14px;\n line-height: 1.5;\n}\n\n.confirm-dialog-buttons {\n display: flex;\n gap: 10px;\n flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.confirm-dialog-button {\n flex: 1;\n min-width: 120px;\n height: 45px;\n border: none;\n font-weight: 700;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n cursor: pointer;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n font-size: 13px;\n transition: background 0.2s;\n}\n\n.confirm-dialog-button-primary {\n background: var(--gold);\n color: var(--black);\n}\n\n.confirm-dialog-button-primary:hover {\n background: var(--gold-hover);\n}\n\n.confirm-dialog-button-secondary {\n background: var(--white-10);\n color: var(--white);\n border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);\n}\n\n.confirm-dialog-button-secondary:hover {\n background: var(--white-15);\n}\n\n.confirm-dialog-close {\n position: absolute;\n top: 8px; \n right: 8px;\n background: none;\n border: none;\n color: var(--white);\n font-size: 22px;\n cursor: pointer;\n width: 35px; \n height: 35px;\n padding: 0;\n font-weight: 500;\n transition: color 0.2s;\n}\n\n.confirm-dialog-close:hover {\n color: var(--error);\n}\n\n/* Liste déroulante dans les overlays */\n.overlay-select {\n width: 100%;\n height: 45px;\n background: var(--white-10);\n border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);\n color: var(--white);\n padding: 0 10px;\n margin-bottom: 20px;\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 16. OVERLAY DÉPLACER BOUTEILLE\n Popup pour changer l'emplacement\n d'une bouteille.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n#moveOverlay {\n z-index: 14000;\n background: rgba(0,0,0,0.95);\n}\n\n.move-panel {\n background: var(--bg-panel);\n backdrop-filter: blur(6px);\n padding: 25px;\n max-width: 500px;\n width: 90%;\n box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);\n position: relative;\n max-height: 90vh;\n overflow-y: auto;\n margin: auto;\n}\n\n\n\n.move-panel h3 {\n color: var(--gold);\n margin-bottom: 20px;\n font-size: 18px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n}\n\n.move-buttons {\n display: flex;\n gap: 10px;\n margin-top: 20px;\n flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 17.
