MESSAGE CENTRÉ (TOAST)\n Apparaît au centre de l'écran pendant\n 3 secondes pour confirmer une action.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n.toast {\n position: fixed;\n top: 50%;\n left: 50%;\n transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.8);\n background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.92);\n color: var(--white);\n padding: 20px 35px;\n border: 1px solid var(--gold);\n font-weight: 500;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n z-index: 99999;\n text-align: center;\n font-size: clamp(13px, 3vw, 15px);\n opacity: 0;\n pointer-events: none;\n transition: opacity 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease;\n max-width: 90%;\n}\n\n.toast.show {\n opacity: 1;\n transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 18. SCANNER DE CODE-BARRES\n Plein écran, caméra centrée.\n Ligne laser animée pour guider le scan.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n.scanner-container {\n display: none;\n position: fixed;\n top: 0; \n left: 0;\n width: 100vw; \n height: 100vh;\n background: var(--black);\n z-index: 9999;\n flex-direction: column;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: space-between;\n padding: 40px 20px;\n}\n\n#scanner-box {\n position: relative;\n width: 100%;\n max-width: 500px;\n height: 300px;\n background: var(--black);\n overflow: hidden;\n margin-top: auto;\n}\n\n#interactive { \n position: relative; \n width: 100%; \n height: 100%; \n}\n\n#interactive video,\n#interactive canvas {\n position: absolute;\n top: 0; \n left: 0;\n width: 100%; \n height: 100%;\n object-fit: cover;\n}\n\n/* Ligne laser rouge animée */\n.laser-line {\n position: absolute;\n top: 20%; \n left: 10%;\n width: 80%; \n height: 2px;\n background: red;\n box-shadow: 0 0 8px red;\n animation: scan 2s infinite linear;\n z-index: 10;\n}\n\n@keyframes scan {\n 0%, 100% { top: 20%; }\n 50% { top: 80%; }\n}\n\n/* Bouton X pour fermer le scanner */\n.cancel-x {\n position: absolute;\n top: 10px; \n right: 10px;\n z-index: 100;\n background: var(--gold);\n width: 40px; \n height: 40px;\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n font-weight: bold;\n cursor: pointer;\n color: var(--black);\n font-size: 20px;\n transition: background 0.2s;\n}\n\n.cancel-x:hover {\n background: var(--gold-hover);\n}\n\n.scanner-controls {\n width: 100%;\n text-align: center;\n padding: 20px;\n margin-bottom: auto;\n z-index: 10001;\n}\n\n/* Texte d'instruction sous le scanner */\n.scanner-help {\n color: var(--white);\n font-size: clamp(11px, 2.5vw, 12px);\n margin-bottom: 15px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 19. MESSAGES DE FEEDBACK\n Utilisés lors des opérations asynchrones\n (chargement, succès, erreur, info).\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n.scan-feedback, .location-feedback {\n margin-top: 10px;\n}\n\n.feedback-loading {\n padding: 12px;\n background: rgba(33,150,243,0.15);\n border-left: 3px solid var(--info);\n margin-top: 10px;\n color: var(--info);\n font-size: 12px;\n}\n\n.feedback-success {\n padding: 12px;\n background: rgba(76,175,80,0.15);\n border-left: 3px solid var(--success);\n margin-top: 10px;\n color: var(--success);\n font-size: 12px;\n}\n\n.feedback-error {\n padding: 12px;\n background: rgba(244,67,54,0.15);\n border-left: 3px solid var(--error);\n margin-top: 10px;\n color: var(--error);\n font-size: 12px;\n}\n\n.feedback-info {\n padding: 12px;\n background: rgba(33,150,243,0.15);\n border-left: 3px solid var(--info);\n margin-top: 10px;\n color: var(--info);\n font-size: 13px;\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 20. RANGÉES DE BOUTONS\n Mise en page flexible pour les groupes\n de boutons (côte à côte ou empilés).\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n.action-buttons-row {\n display: flex;\n gap: 8px;\n flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.action-button-full { \n width: 100%; \n}\n\n.action-button-flex-1 { \n flex: 1; \n min-width: 120px;\n}\n\n.action-button-flex-2 { \n flex: 2; \n min-width: 150px;\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 21. UTILITAIRES\n Classes courtes réutilisables partout.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n\n/* Marges */\n.mt-10 { margin-top: 10px; }\n.mt-20 { margin-top: 20px; }\n.mt-40 { margin-top: 40px; }\n.mb-20 { margin-bottom: 20px; }\n\n/* Paddings */\n.p-8 { padding: 8px; }\n.p-12 { padding: 12px; }\n\n/* Alignement */\n.text-center { text-align: center; }\n.text-uppercase { text-transform: uppercase; }\n\n/* Couleurs de texte */\n.color-primary { color: var(--gold); }\n.color-white { color: var(--white); }\n.color-muted { color: var(--white-60); }\n.color-error { color: var(--error); }\n\n/* Tailles de police */\n.fs-11 { font-size: 11px; }\n.fs-12 { font-size: 12px; }\n.fs-13 { font-size: 13px; }\n.fs-14 { font-size: 14px; }\n\n/* Poids de police */\n.fw-600 { font-weight: 600; }\n\n\nselect {\n scrollbar-width: thin;\n scrollbar-color: var(--gold) transparent;\n}\n\nselect::-webkit-scrollbar {\n width: 4px;\n}\n\nselect::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n background: transparent;\n}\n\nselect::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n background: var(--gold);\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 22. RESPONSIVE MOBILE\n Ajustements pour les petits écrans.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n@media (max-width: 600px) {\n \n #mainWrapper {\n padding: 5px 15px;\n padding-top: 45px;\n }\n \n .view-section-padding {\n padding: 30px 15px;\n }\n \n .view-section-actions {\n margin-top: 60px;\n }\n \n .page-header {\n padding-bottom: 12px;\n margin-bottom: 15px;\n }\n \n .filter-bar select {\n font-size: 9px;\n padding: 0 5px;\n }\n \n .bottle-card {\n flex-direction: column;\n align-items: flex-start;\n gap: 10px;\n }\n \n .bottle-card-actions {\n width: 100%;\n justify-content: flex-end;\n }\n \n .action-buttons-row {\n flex-direction: column;\n }\n \n .action-button-flex-1,\n .action-button-flex-2 {\n width: 100%;\n min-width: unset;\n }\n \n .fichevin-window {\n padding: 15px;\n }\n \n .move-panel {\n padding: 20px;\n }\n \n .confirm-dialog-buttons {\n flex-direction: column;\n }\n \n .confirm-dialog-button {\n width: 100%;\n min-width: unset;\n }\n}\n\n@media (max-width: 400px) {\n .filter-bar select {\n font-size: 8px;\n padding: 0 3px;\n }\n \n .data-table th,\n .data-table td {\n padding: 8px 5px;\n font-size: 10px;\n }\n}\n\n@media (min-width: 1280px) {\n body::after {\n background: linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.15), rgba(255,255,255,0.15)),\n url(\"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1738544475560-0683270451bd?q\u003d80\u0026w\u003d1470\u0026auto\u003dformat\u0026fit\u003dcrop\")\n center center / cover no-repeat !important;\n }\n}\n\n\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 23. POPUP NOUVEAU VIN SCANNÉ\n Apparaît après un scan pour saisir\n les infos du nouveau vin.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n.overlay-popup {\n position: fixed;\n top: 0;\n left: 0;\n width: 100%;\n height: 100%;\n background: transparent;\n backdrop-filter: none;\n z-index: 9999;\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n padding: 0;\n opacity: 0;\n pointer-events: none;\n transition: opacity 0.3s ease;\n scrollbar-width: none;\n} \n#edit-fiche-popup {\n align-items: flex-start;\n overflow-y: auto;\n z-index: 20000;\n padding: 0;\n justify-content: center;\n left: 0;\n right: 0;\n}\n\n\n\n.overlay-popup.active {\n opacity: 1;\n pointer-events: auto;\n}\n\n/* Fenêtre du popup */\n.popup-window {\n width: 100%;\n max-width: 680px;\n background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95);\n border-left: 2px solid var(--gold);\n color: var(--white);\n margin: 60px auto 40px;\n}\n\n.overlay-popup.active .popup-window {\n transform: translateY(0);\n}\n\n/* En-tête du popup */\n.popup-header {\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: center;\n padding: 20px;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gold);\n flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.popup-title {\n font-size: 16px;\n color: var(--white);\n text-transform: uppercase;\n margin: 0;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n}\n\n/* Zone scrollable du popup */\n.popup-content {\n padding: 20px;\n overflow-y: auto;\n flex: 1;\n scrollbar-width: none;\n -ms-overflow-style: none;\n}\n\n.popup-content::-webkit-scrollbar {\n display: none;\n}\n\n/* Boutons en bas du popup */\n.popup-actions {\n padding: 20px;\n display: flex;\n gap: 10px;\n border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);\n flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.popup-actions button {\n flex: 1;\n}\n\n/* Options dans les listes déroulantes */\nselect option {\n background-color: #1a1a1a !important;\n color: #ffffff !important;\n padding: 10px;\n}\n\nselect option:checked {\n background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(230,161,0,0.4), rgba(230,161,0,0.2)) !important;\n color: var(--gold) !important;\n}\n\nselect option:hover {\n background-color: rgba(230,161,0,0.3) !important;\n color: var(--gold) !important;\n}\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n 24. ACCUEIL — CLASSES SPÉCIFIQUES\n Styles pour la page d'accueil uniquement.\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n\n/* Bloc cliquable \"Les vins de Bacchus\" */\n.accueil-cave-btn {\n cursor: pointer;\n display: flex;\n flex-direction: column;\n align-items: center;\n gap: 0;\n padding: 20px 0;\n}\n\n/* Texte \"Les vins de Bacchus\" */\n.accueil-cave-label {\n font-size: 15px;\n font-weight: 300;\n letter-spacing: 3px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--white);\n padding-bottom: 10px;\n}\n\n/* Ligne séparatrice fine */\n.accueil-separator {\n width: 60%;\n height: 1px;\n background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);\n margin: 5px 0;\n}\n\n/* Compteur \"67 bouteilles en inventaire\" */\n.accueil-total-text {\n font-size: 14px;\n font-weight: 300;\n letter-spacing: 2px;\n color: var(--white-70);\n padding-top: 10px;\n}\n\n/* Ligne cépages ou appellations (sans boîte) */\n.accueil-section-item {\n display: flex;\n justify-content: center;\n gap: 15px;\n align-items: center;\n padding: 18px 15px;\n cursor: pointer;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--white-15);\n font-size: 14px;\n font-weight: 300;\n letter-spacing: 2px;\n color: var(--white);\n text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n\n.accueil-section-item:last-of-type {\n border-bottom: none;\n}\n\n\n\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n ACCUEIL — ITEMS CÉPAGES ET APPELLATIONS\n Version finale : fond transparent + majuscules\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n\n.card-cepage-item {\n padding: 12px 20px;\n border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,129,60,0.2);\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: center;\n font-size: 12px;\n font-weight: 300;\n letter-spacing: 1.5px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n cursor: pointer;\n color: var(--white);\n}\n\n.card-cepage-item:last-child {\n border-bottom: none;\n}\n\n.card-cepage-count {\n color: var(--white-50);\n font-size: 12px;\n font-weight: 300;\n}\n\n/* Compteur (chiffre à droite) — commun aux deux */\n.card-cepage-count {\n color: var(--white-50);\n font-size: 12px;\n font-weight: 300;\n}\n\n\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n HISTORIQUE — PLATS BUS\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n\n.historique-mets {\n display: flex;\n flex-wrap: wrap;\n gap: 6px;\n margin-top: 8px;\n width: 100%;\n}\n.historique-met-item {\n font-size: 11px;\n padding: 4px 8px 4px 10px;\n background: var(--white-05);\n display: flex;\n flex-direction: column;\n gap: 2px;\n flex: 0 0 auto;\n width: calc(50% - 3px);\n box-sizing: border-box;\n}\n\n.historique-met-date {\n font-size: 10px;\n color: var(--white-50);\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n BADGE DISPONIBILITÉ (liste d'achat)\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n\n.dispo-badge {\n font-size: 13px;\n font-weight: 300;\n text-align: right;\n}\n\n.dispo-badge-oui {\n color: var(--success);\n}\n\n.dispo-badge-non {\n color: var(--error);\n}\n\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n BLOCS DÉPLIABLES (collapsible)\n Utilisés dans la vue Emplacements\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n\n.collapsible-header {\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: center;\n cursor: pointer;\n padding: 12px 15px;\n font-size: 13px;\n font-weight: 300;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n color: var(--white);\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--white-15);\n}\n\n.collapsible-content {\n padding-top: 5px;\n}\n\n.collapsible-item {\n display: flex;\n justify-content: space-between;\n align-items: center;\n padding: 10px 5px;\n cursor: pointer;\n border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);\n}\n\n.collapsible-item:last-child {\n border-bottom: none;\n}\n\n/* \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n VIEW-RACHETER\n \u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d */\n\n.racheter-margin {\n margin: 15px;\n}\n\n.form-succursale {\n display: none;\n margin-bottom: 10px;\n}\n\n.succursale-inputs {\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n gap: 10px;\n margin-bottom: 10px;\n}\n\n.succursale-form-actions {\n display: flex;\n gap: 10px;\n}\n\n.btn-ajouter-succursale {\n height: 45px;\n border: 1px solid rgba(201,129,60,0.4);\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n cursor: pointer;\n font-size: 14px;\n font-weight: 300;\n letter-spacing: 1px;\n color: var(--white);\n}\n\n.dispo-status-bar {\n display: none;\n padding: 10px 15px;\n font-size: 13px;\n font-weight: 300;\n color: var(--white-70);\n text-align: center;\n}\n\n\n\n\n\u003c/style\u003e",0,0],["Références",2,"\u003c!--\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n FICHIER REFERENCE — PROJET DIONYSOS (VINO)\n À LIRE EN PREMIER AVANT TOUT TRAVAIL DE CODE\n Écrit en langage simple pour être compris par tous.\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\nCE FICHIER EST LA LOI DU PROJET.\nSi une instruction ici contredit une demande dans le chat,\nce fichier a priorité. Poser la question avant de coder.\n\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n STRUCTURE DU PROJET — 4 FICHIERS\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n Index.html — La page principale. Contient le HTML visible.\n Styles.html — Toutes les couleurs, tailles, apparences.\n Scripts.html — Tout ce qui bouge et réagit (logique).\n Code.gs — Le serveur Google (pas de style ici).\n\n RÈGLE : chaque chose à sa place, jamais ailleurs.\n\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n RÈGLE #1 — ZÉRO STYLE EN DUR\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n INTERDIT dans le HTML :\n \u003cdiv style\u003d\"color:red; font-size:14px;\"\u003e\n\n INTERDIT dans le JS (innerHTML) :\n div.innerHTML \u003d '\u003cdiv style\u003d\"font-size:14px;\"\u003e'\n\n OBLIGATOIRE : toujours utiliser une classe CSS\n \u003cdiv class\u003d\"wine-name\"\u003e\n div.innerHTML \u003d '\u003cdiv class\u003d\"wine-name\"\u003e'\n\n SI UNE CLASSE N'EXISTE PAS ENCORE :\n 1. La créer dans Styles.html\n 2. L'ajouter à ce fichier REFERENCE\n 3. Ensuite seulement l'utiliser\n\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n RÈGLE #2 — UNE SEULE FONCTION PAR TYPE DE CARTE\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n Il existe une seule fonction qui génère une carte de vin :\n genererCardVin(item, options)\n\n Elle est utilisée par TOUTES les pages :\n - Liste principale\n - Historique\n - À ranger\n - Liste d'achat\n - Emplacements\n - Promotions\n\n INTERDIT de créer une nouvelle fonction qui génère\n une carte de vin différemment.\n\n SI on a besoin d'une variante (ex: carte avec date),\n on ajoute un paramètre optionnel à genererCardVin().\n\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n RÈGLE #3 — VÉRIFIER AVANT DE CRÉER\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n Avant de créer une nouvelle classe CSS, demander :\n \"Est-ce qu'une classe existe déjà pour ça ?\"\n\n Avant de créer une nouvelle fonction JS, demander :\n \"Est-ce qu'une fonction existante peut être réutilisée ?\"\n\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n CLASSES CSS — LISTE OFFICIELLE\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n --- COULEURS (variables) ---\n --gold : couleur or principale (#c9813c)\n --gold-hover : or au survol (#C98D4F)\n --white : blanc pur\n --white-70 : blanc à 90% (texte secondaire)\n --white-60 : blanc à 70% (texte discret)\n --white-50 : blanc à 60% (texte très discret)\n --white-15 : blanc à 15% (bordures légères)\n --white-10 : blanc à 10% (fonds transparents)\n --white-05 : blanc à 5%\n --red : rouge (#c0392b) — actions dangereuses\n --green : vert (#27ae60) — confirmations\n --orange : orange (#e67e22) — avertissements\n --error : rouge erreur (#f44336)\n --success : vert succès (#4caf50)\n --info : bleu info (#2196f3)\n --warning : jaune (#ffc107)\n --bg-overlay : fond des menus/popups (noir 85%)\n --bg-card : fond des cartes de vin (noir 50%)\n --bg-panel : fond des panneaux (noir 95%)\n\n --- MISE EN PAGE ---\n .view-section : une page/vue (cachée par défaut)\n .view-section.active : la vue visible\n .view-section-padding : espacement intérieur d'une vue\n .view-section-inner : conteneur centré dans une vue\n .view-section-actions : espace sous le titre accueil\n .page-header : barre de titre avec ligne dorée\n .page-title : titre d'une page secondaire\n #mainWrapper : conteneur principal centré (max 700px)\n\n --- NAVIGATION ---\n #topNav : barre du haut (burger + loupe + titre)\n #burger : bouton hamburger (☰)\n #searchBtn : bouton scanner (loupe)\n .side-menu : menu latéral gauche\n .side-menu.open : menu ouvert\n\n --- BLOCS CONTENEURS ---\n .bloc-niveau-1 : bloc principal (fond noir transparent)\n .bloc-niveau-2 : élément dans un bloc (bordure dorée)\n .bloc-niveau-3 : sous-élément (bordure dorée subtile)\n .bloc-niveau-4 : texte dans un bloc (sans bordure)\n\n --- CARTES DE VIN ---\n .wine-card : carte de vin (fond semi-transparent)\n .wine-card.rouge : bordure gauche rouge foncé\n .wine-card.blanc : bordure gauche crème\n .wine-card.rose : bordure gauche rose\n .wine-card.bulles : bordure gauche turquoise\n .wine-card-left : colonne gauche flexible\n .wine-card-right : colonne droite rigide, alignée en haut\n .wine-name : nom du vin (gras, majuscules, 14px)\n .wine-sub : pays et région (blanc discret, 11px)\n .wine-cepage : cépage (blanc très discret, 11px)\n .wine-count : compteur de bouteilles (or, 11px)\n .wine-emplacement : emplacement (blanc discret, 11px)\n .wine-emplacement-ranger : \"A ranger\" (orange, 11px)\n\n --- BOUTEILLES (dans la fiche vin) ---\n .bottles-list : liste des bouteilles\n .bottle-card : carte d'une bouteille\n .bottle-card-location : emplacement de la bouteille\n .bottle-card-actions : boutons d'action sur la bouteille\n .bottle-number : numéro de bouteille (or)\n .bottle-to-arrange : texte \"À ranger\" (orange)\n .bottle-status-bu : texte \"Bue\" (discret)\n .btn-bottle-action : bouton action bouteille (base)\n .btn-bottle-move : bouton Déplacer\n .btn-bottle-drink : bouton Boire\n\n --- FILTRES ---\n .filter-container : bloc conteneur des filtres\n .filter-row : rangée de filtres (flex)\n .filter-select : liste déroulante dans les filtres\n .filter-input : champ texte dans les filtres\n .filter-separator : ligne dorée entre les rangées\n .filter-reset : bouton X pour réinitialiser\n\n --- BOUTONS ---\n .btn-primary : bouton principal (or, noir)\n .btn-secondary : bouton neutre (transparent)\n .btn-scan : bouton scanner\n .btn-close-form : bouton fermer X (transparent)\n .btn-compact : version compacte d'un bouton\n .btn-saq : bouton SAQ (carré doré)\n .btn-add-bottle : bouton ajouter une bouteille\n .btn-bg-green : variante verte\n .btn-bg-red : variante rouge\n .btn-bg-orange : variante orange\n\n --- FORMULAIRES ---\n .field-container : conteneur d'un champ (label + input)\n .form-divider : séparateur de section dans un formulaire\n\n --- FICHE VIN (overlay) ---\n .fichevin-overlay : fond de l'overlay fiche vin\n .fichevin-window : fenêtre de la fiche vin\n .fichevin-header : en-tête (nom + boutons)\n .fv-title : nom du vin dans la fiche\n .fv-title-link : nom cliquable (lien SAQ)\n .fv-origine : bloc origine (pays, région)\n .fiche-origine-texts : textes d'origine\n .fiche-header-actions : groupe boutons en-tête\n .fiche-icon-btn : bouton icône (crayon, X)\n .fiche-section : section dans la fiche\n .fiche-section-title : titre de section (or, 13px)\n .fiche-section-inventaire : section inventaire (fond doré)\n .fiche-field : champ d'info dans la fiche\n .fiche-label : étiquette d'un champ\n .fiche-aromes : arômes en italique\n .fiche-table : grille des caractéristiques\n .fiche-table-cell : cellule de la grille\n .fiche-table-label : étiquette d'une cellule\n .fiche-table-value : valeur d'une cellule\n .fiche-empty : message \"aucune bouteille\"\n\n --- POPUPS ET OVERLAYS ---\n .overlay-popup : base d'un popup (plein écran)\n .overlay-popup.active : popup visible\n .popup-window : fenêtre du popup\n .popup-header : en-tête du popup\n .popup-title : titre du popup\n .popup-content : zone scrollable du popup\n .popup-actions : boutons en bas du popup\n .confirm-overlay : overlay de confirmation\n .confirm-dialog : boîte de dialogue\n .confirm-dialog-buttons : groupe de boutons\n .confirm-dialog-button : bouton dans la boîte\n .confirm-dialog-button-primary : bouton confirmer\n .confirm-dialog-button-secondary : bouton annuler\n .confirm-dialog-close : bouton X de fermeture\n .overlay-select : liste déroulante dans overlay\n .move-panel : panneau déplacer bouteille\n .move-buttons : boutons du panneau déplacer\n\n --- SCANNER ---\n .scanner-container : plein écran scanner\n .scanner-controls : boutons sous le scanner\n .scanner-help : texte d'instruction\n .laser-line : ligne rouge animée\n\n --- MESSAGES ---\n .toast : message temporaire centré\n .toast.show : message visible\n .alert-box : boîte d'alerte (fond doré)\n .alert-content : contenu de l'alerte\n .feedback-loading : message chargement (bleu)\n .feedback-success : message succès (vert)\n .feedback-error : message erreur (rouge)\n .feedback-info : message info (bleu)\n\n --- TABLEAUX ---\n .data-table : tableau de données\n .data-table-row-rouge : ligne rouge\n .data-table-row-blanc : ligne blanc\n .data-table-row-rose : ligne rosé\n\n --- UTILITAIRES ---\n .mt-10 : marge haut 10px\n .mt-20 : marge haut 20px\n .mt-40 : marge haut 40px\n .mb-20 : marge bas 20px\n .p-8 : padding 8px\n .p-12 : padding 12px\n .text-center : centré\n .text-uppercase : majuscules\n .color-primary : couleur or\n .color-white : blanc\n .color-muted : blanc discret\n .color-error : rouge erreur\n .fs-11 : police 11px\n .fs-12 : police 12px\n .fs-13 : police 13px\n .fs-14 : police 14px\n .fw-600 : gras 600\n\n --- RANGÉES DE BOUTONS ---\n .action-buttons-row : groupe de boutons (flex)\n .action-button-full : bouton pleine largeur\n .action-button-flex-1 : bouton flexible (1 part)\n .action-button-flex-2 : bouton flexible (2 parts)\n\n --- MULTI-SELECT ---\n .multi-select-container : conteneur liste à coches\n .multi-select-header : en-tête de la liste\n .multi-select-list : liste déroulante\n .checkbox-item : item avec case à cocher\n\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n CLASSES À CRÉER — STYLES INLINE ENCORE PRÉSENTS\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n Ces styles existent en dur dans le HTML ou JS.\n Ils doivent être convertis en classes lors du refactoring.\n\n Dans HTML (Index.html) :\n .accueil-cave-btn — bloc cliquable vers la cave\n .accueil-separator — ligne séparatrice blanche (80%)\n .accueil-total-text — texte compteur bouteilles\n .succursale-inputs — grille 2 colonnes pour inputs\n .dispo-status-bar — barre de statut disponibilité\n .recherche-grid — grille 2 colonnes recherche avancée\n .recherche-actions — boutons bas de la recherche\n .fiche-prix — prix affiché dans la fiche\n\n Dans JS (Scripts.html) :\n .card-cepage-item — item cépage/appellation à l'accueil\n .card-promo — carte promotion SAQ\n .card-promo-prix — prix dans une carte promo\n .card-promo-dispo — disponibilité dans une carte promo\n .succursale-item — résultat succursale (nom + distance)\n .succursale-adresse — adresse cliquable d'une succursale\n .multiples-section — bloc \"vins en double\"\n .cepages-manquants-section — bloc cépages manquants Cellier\n .doublons-section — bloc doublons cépages Cellier\n .collapsible-header — en-tête cliquable (toggle)\n .collapsible-content — contenu masquable\n .collapsible-item — item dans un contenu masquable\n .accord-verre — icône verre accord mets-vin\n .drink-form — formulaire \"boire une bouteille\"\n .historique-mets — liste des plats dans l'historique\n .historique-met-item — un plat dans l'historique\n .dispo-badge — badge disponibilité sur une carte\n\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n HISTORIQUE DES MODIFICATIONS\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n\n 2025 — Version initiale du projet Dionysos\n 2026-02 — Refactoring complet : zéro style inline\n\n\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\u003d\n--\u003e",0,0],["memoire",2,"\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e\n\u003chtml\u003e\n \u003chead\u003e\n \u003cbase target\u003d\"_top\"\u003e\n \u003c/head\u003e\n \u003cbody\u003e\n \u003cnav id\u003d\"sideMenu\" class\u003d\"side-menu\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv class\u003d\"confirm-dialog-close\" onclick\u003d\"closeMenu()\"\u003e✕\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\n\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"changeView('accueil');closeMenu()\"\u003eACCUEIL\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"changeView('liste');closeMenu()\"\u003eCAVE A VIN\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"changeView('emplacements');closeMenu()\"\u003eEMPLACEMENTS\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"changeView('historique');closeMenu()\"\u003eHISTORIQUE\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"changeView('racheter');closeMenu()\"\u003eLISTE D'ACHAT\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003ca onclick\u003d\"changeView('recherche');closeMenu()\"\u003eRECHERCHE\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003ca
